name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: We're adapting. But the goal is still the same.
body:
Working toward November, fighting for Wisconsin! No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-e-nuitiz-ahkdjtlkr-o/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuitiz-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Peter,This isn't what we expected out of April, that's for sure.Instead, we're **fighting overreach from an incompetent governor** _(Tony Evers)_ , **defending our economy from a radical, out-of-touch liberal** _(Tony Evers)_ , and **protecting our democracy from a governor who doesn't know how to lead** _(Tony Evers)._ [Join Fitz - Defend Wisconsin!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuitiz-ahkdjtlkr-y/) I'm running for Congress to support President Trump and bring **Wisconsin common sense** to Washington. But this year isn't turning out the way any of us hoped.In a normal year, we would be busy with big fundraising events, parades, festivals, door-to-door grassroots outreach, and big campaign rallies.But we've adapted. Instead of in-person events, today I want to ask for your _electronic_ support instead. [Contribute Online - Click Here!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuitiz-ahkdjtlkr-j/)
### There's something else you can do to help.
### If you live in the 5th Congressional District, I hope you'll consider printing out a copy of my nomination papers (available on my [website](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuitiz-ahkdjtlkr-t/)), and signing it yourself to help me get on the ballot.
### As for our campaign, we're adapting as best we can. The goal in front of us is still **victory on Election Day, **because President Trump needs support in Congress more than ever.
And the attacks from the rabid left are still going to be coming our way, so we need to be ready and well-funded to fight them back.So I hope I can still count on you, even in this unexpected time!Thanks,Scott FitzgeraldP.S., Here's the link once more to [support our campaign online](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuitiz-ahkdjtlkr-i/). Thanks, and I hope to see you in person, sooner rather than later.
## **Join The Fight**
• Receive Campaign Updates
• Volunteer
• Invite Your Friends
## **Support President Trump**
• Scott Fitzgerald was one of the earliest and most loyal Trump supporters in Wisconsin.
• President Trump needs allies like Scott Fitzgerald in Washington.
## **Forward and Share**
• Forward This Email To Friends
• Facebook: FitzgeraldForWI
• Twitter: FitzgeraldForWI | [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuitiz-ahkdjtlkr-d/)| [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuitiz-ahkdjtlkr-h/)| [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-l-nuitiz-ahkdjtlkr-u/)
---|---|---
**If you would like to mail in a contribution, please make checks payable and mail to:**
Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
PO Box 102
Juneau, WI 53039
[Preferences](https://scottfitzgerald.updatemyprofile.com/t-nuitiz-62D8F9CE-ahkdjtlkr-b) | [Unsubscribe](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail20.com/t/t-u-nuitiz-ahkdjtlkr-n/)

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Cotton Editorial on China Virus
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
I wanted to share the editorial I wrote in the Wall Street Journal about the likely origins of the China virus. The media and the Chinese Communist Party have attacked me nonstop ever since I pointed out the potential role that the labs in Wuhan played in spreading this virus. I’m not backing down from this fight, but I would appreciate your support as I take on both Communist China and the mainstream media.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42331553&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwMTI1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
Peter,

I wanted to share the editorial I wrote in the Wall Street Journal about the likely origins of the China virus. Read it here. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=NDIzMzE1NTMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwMTI1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

The media and the Chinese Communist Party have attacked me nonstop ever since I pointed out the potential role that the labs in Wuhan played in spreading this virus.

I’m not backing down from this fight, but I would appreciate your support as I take on both Communist China and the mainstream media. Click here to contribute. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=NDIzMzE1NTMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwMTI1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

Thank you for continued support and friendship.
http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIzMzE1NTMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwMTI1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
In service,

Tom

The U.S. government is investigating whether the Covid-19 virus came from a government laboratory in Wuhan, China. The Chinese Communist Party denies the possibility. “There is no way this virus came from us,” claimed Yuan Zhiming over the weekend. Mr. Yuan is a top researcher at the Wuhan Institute of Virology, which studies some of the world’s deadliest pathogens. He is also secretary of the lab’s Communist Party committee. He accuses me of “deliberately trying to mislead people” for suggesting his laboratory as a possible origin for the pandemic.

Beijing has claimed that the virus originated in a Wuhan “wet market,” where wild animals were sold. But evidence to counter this theory emerged in January. Chinese researchers reported in the Lancet Jan. 24 that the first known cases had no contact with the market, and Chinese state media acknowledged the finding. There’s no evidence the market sold bats or pangolins, the animals from which the virus is thought to have jumped to humans. And the bat species that carries it isn’t found within 100 miles of Wuhan.

Wuhan has two labs where we know bats and humans interacted. One is the Institute of Virology, eight miles from the wet market; the other is the Wuhan Center for Disease Control and Prevention, barely 300 yards from the market.

Both labs collect live animals to study viruses. Their researchers travel to caves across China to capture bats for this purpose. Chinese state media released a minidocumentary in mid-December following a team of Wuhan CDC researchers collecting viruses from bats in caves. The researchers fretted openly about the risk of infection.

These risks were not limited to the field. The Washington Post reported last week that in 2018 U.S. diplomats in China warned of “a serious shortage of appropriately trained technicians and investigators needed to safely operate” the Institute of Virology. The Wuhan CDC operates at even lower biosafety standards.

While the Chinese government denies the possibility of a lab leak, its actions tell a different story. The Chinese military posted its top epidemiologist to the Institute of Virology in January. In February Chairman Xi Jinping urged swift implementation of new biosafety rules to govern pathogens in laboratory settings. Academic papers about the virus’s origins are now subject to prior restraint by the government.

In early January, enforcers threatened doctors who warned their colleagues about the virus. Among them was Li Wenliang, who died of Covid-19 in February. Laboratories working to sequence the virus’s genetic code were ordered to destroy their samples. The laboratory that first published the virus’s genome was shut down, Hong Kong’s South China Morning Post reported in February.

This evidence is circumstantial, to be sure, but it all points toward the Wuhan labs. Thanks to the Chinese coverup, we may never have direct, conclusive evidence—intelligence rarely works that way—but Americans justifiably can use common sense to follow the inherent logic of events to their likely conclusion.
Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
Suite 200
Little Rock, AR 72202

Senator Cotton was honorably discharged from the U.S. Army. Images do not imply endorsement by the Department of Defense or any service branch.

Privacy Policy http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDIzMzE1NTMS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwMTI1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0
Unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42331553&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjQwMTI1NgS2&mt=1&rt=0

name: Mike Bloomberg
subject: Fighting for our planet
body:
On the 50th Earth Day, our opportunity.

| _You're receiving this email because of your participation with Mike Bloomberg 2020. We'll be sending you updates like this on initiatives and issues we think you'll be interested in. Thank you!_ [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f9089106b5024ecfa67d633403c8a8b9&_e=hh1UC2kTKOZNNnt8TqzxEj1SFoYT0Yqvg9X6YTnnb0ZU_5N1QkHBpnrHa5YTnLsHYG4QNJWWqiAaOnz7Nt-lNMgV1tVZBqjMgRwWa2hxrZCibZmalIYinQsFsLUQJls_xqFOUGj4hLv6lMlWUolfvo7ZeReL_-1C4RY91iX1IPJ_2A-0CCo_2G3nV5J04Sno3wjT2d2fzNECLL7I_EdfKesmx_ZumIbTiv1Q11iZeczWkKFv3dISnTEUagqmfW_E1Q5DB_nYcA8_U2e6I3P2Eg%3D%3D) Friend, On the 50th anniversary of Earth Day, we’re confronting not one but two global disasters: the recent COVID-19 pandemic, and the ongoing climate change crisis.

The idea that has animated Earth Day for five decades -- that by working together as a global community, we can protect people and our planet -- is more important today than ever before.

In that spirit, I wanted to share a brief video about how -- even in these difficult times -- we can build a stronger, more sustainable future: [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f9089106b5024ecfa67d633403c8a8b9&_e=hh1UC2kTKOZNNnt8TqzxEiMMlRX_CFnR4pRPt1dhSJSdZQB8Yo0IUFV25jZ3aEXaygvG-zy4xLMwiDmdadue96XBIkOiq8qugjS2xA-cfx2CiUEyY8vOiPRr8g8Ft0UM6SHic1mmHWRfpfPbuNUcQ_8XHkCv8NYWtOij5XI3zPPSfnqVfOuaoGTsa9zUQKZv8Y2dEmaSGsbeZoVb_5FX95EeAVLkHUcXCgKotbKxtIdvZWZlpkWTdykgfhm_KDulBaO3Uypxn75lzq2aPs9biMfxPrKsUBsP-eqQfaAz3D6z7ze2eQt03kzlulikGkXSthUMhJR0McuaqjWFa0U5VA%3D%3D) We can make faster progress on climate change as we fight this pandemic. We can -- and must -- do both.

\- Mike Bloomberg

P.S. -- For an update on the progress we're making, read **["Covid, Climate, and Collective Action,"](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f9089106b5024ecfa67d633403c8a8b9&_e=hh1UC2kTKOZNNnt8TqzxEj1SFoYT0Yqvg9X6YTnnb0Y4pupF7z5Mwy4iHLAK7rbu47mQ-thW_PFwBPSLPjc2pdXoffXRl5fnERwP0LKLsjwG7mh-Lc3ec4JXbfwBt9V15qScu7Qxf55dXGk2cqvOSbE2QHbookWZp55CAjF6b2mwfNsBstSKqz7JasbbG3wUUF5Pttpc76g9rJC05HmOrrx4lVAg6mVY-u6xTMDsZm4-owu9GBglsLq_SaT8ANxnBw3cgCsM6zG1-gwOHI1VKVx6NvOMqsM5l5D7BnklZxPwT0ZdlBOKXEkJygeW5GRcKTdjLOHZ20j-Z7pSeYEcr7fOmYdZy3tMSvMbRgSQ79Jy-p6PqhcgC0ofZWwc-mhsVIC6CHuysSiwmL2GSaa9MN8OV_7OB1s7G8WcWsuKJQk%3D)** a blog post from Antha Williams, the head of our Environment program at Bloomberg Philanthropies.
---

| [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f9089106b5024ecfa67d633403c8a8b9&_e=hh1UC2kTKOZNNnt8TqzxEo-9yk37SoebYMKlicIGZ9uaNdgUBVgkcMh16dBFjGK2jJHq_eavUsohnbWgK2UbE9BN5H4rWcUdbaFcAolHM5SSYQHUUwbedgeRRoOzoM9pbWBYY6PrPYbKPIRbDRmqchP5zVFrgdSu_FmTMAr2qO3eHiXhefpMNCCx0M6XndPPOsR_fb9AaieTW6po6_9DckeeQdQMWffO2DntK4_HW_D4LsSnhoQlKWv1gfpVQlIwcEEwwHlbLd5sND3nJVtu8XXoNxzKFbbF7AFa5jWK3dk%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f9089106b5024ecfa67d633403c8a8b9&_e=hh1UC2kTKOZNNnt8TqzxElBa8PLK-oZaML-GWkgGtGPQqgcFYSo7oS2q7RusoUw7Y6yzuhISb1ErNJ_6Smkkpjqmkdy1_knjUmifXSSw6ibsb9RzoOCFoelifdwjzjSvjJvH1fQAxBJUJL2PVunNrqpFm0l9pJSnSlwt-EP74PtfXiLeRZZoHSQ7TLh9PFKKpmyq_JpC8dtYbFRJwlvd3owycGB0XiReTbD1H2vH4nIt4QJ9Ke_QC_j0MeUv89RKJQDv2nk8DLKN2w5wAHdmzg%3D%3D) | | [](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/u/click?_t=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_m=f9089106b5024ecfa67d633403c8a8b9&_e=hh1UC2kTKOZNNnt8TqzxErvdAEnF1vmMpdrdV_OHzbhzXgL8fJCoSOsU9JmplLZHXtmJzpVN3wpv5BRqa-AyAscqMtJF2VbzEdH6-Q8z-NCx_Z483vGVWBiLwf0Z7YdJ5PUG8gYTfmCYnSIRAuf3trMOMF5z4fq38qytsmm5HiymyQMrwio7YevjAt9RF9yQDB0fGisQzD2Vm6vurCLWFF_o34v6SG8O-V6U6dyaBmVy-49OeOs1VvoIY5qA2Ky-dEDl2U5DMuTGr0ulRfffYTNJqlOQhVoXyPNkYMAx7Is%3D)
---|---|---|---|---

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://i.mikebloomberg.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=8613ca2a3316453b8f979e9fa5797d01&_s=f9089106b5024ecfa67d633403c8a8b9&_t=Kvw5qnaJz8T40zqJmWB96v0FFQItBuk3DPvXDzfkyd7tBf6kP2BC-hN38-_V8uviL4dWP9S5ikkBFrWWXTab2jptzI7EDBilspaaAwxzclekka615VA5aXiX3m9yEiE1vmq4qTwLhDsZd5TPJg71DhlrWxDw_6xUIDGR7RggmkQ%3D).

name: Steve Chabot
subject: Reopen America Task Force
body:
Opening Up America Again No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-z/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-r/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [Reopen America Task Force](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-j/)
In this week's blog, I discuss why the Paycheck Protection Program ran out of cash, and the reason Democrats are holding up addition funds. I also write about President Trump's new task force and announced guidelines for reopening the economy and our country. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Turning 100 in the Time of the Coronavirus](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-d/)
In this time of the coronavirus, it seems that virtually every news story we see on TV, or read about in the newspapers, is concerning this deadly virus. And rightfully so. I've written about COVID-19 the last five weeks in this blog. Of course while the virus rages, most peoples' lives go on, and this week I wanted to focus on a small group of people among us - those who live for a century. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Helping Small Businesses](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-u/)
The coronavirus crisis has affected all of our lives in so many ways. Palm Sunday was just three days ago, and Easter is just four days ahead. Yet America's churches are all but empty. America's small businesses would normally be busy and thriving, but a significant number of them are shuttered. In this week's blog, I review three pieces of legislation Congress has recently passed to help small businesses, the backbone of our great nation. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [The Largest Rescue Package in American History](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-n/)
In this week's blog, I discuss the CARES Act (The Coronavirus Aid, Relief, and Economic Security Act) which the President signed into law over the weekend. You may be interested to learn who will benefit from this $2.2 trillion bill, perhaps even you and your family. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-p/) [Donate](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-x/) [Get a Yard Sign](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-m/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-c/) | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-q/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-a/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-f/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.
[ Share ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-fb-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-v/)
[ Tweet ](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-tw-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-e/)
[ Forward ](https://stevechabotforcongress.forwardtomyfriend.com/r-kujkulhluu-961825B2-jhurdhkt-l-s)
[Preferences](https://stevechabotforcongress.updatemyprofile.com/r-jhurdhkt-961825B2-kujkulhluu-g) | [Unsubscribe](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-u-jhurdhkt-kujkulhluu-w/)

name: Rick Kennedy
subject: Engaging Voters in a COVID -19 World
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Kennedy for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17235655/187528174/-1907457918?refcode=04032020_em_hdr&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdlODhlMS02ZDg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCKf7Leu_v314RGJ_de27dcxy14ZPT7VPBNP-grKlnc=)
---
Dear Friend, In our most recent survey, over 90% of respondents characterized the administration's response to the COVID-19 pandemic as "A complete and continuing disaster." Who we elect at every level of government really does matter. [I need your help to make sure we elect the right person to fill this empty seat.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17235656/187528175/-1907457919?refcode=04232020_em_line1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdlODhlMS02ZDg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCKf7Leu_v314RGJ_de27dcxy14ZPT7VPBNP-grKlnc=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17235657/187528176/1282705599?refcode=04232020_em_button1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdlODhlMS02ZDg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCKf7Leu_v314RGJ_de27dcxy14ZPT7VPBNP-grKlnc=)
---
We held a virtual town hall last night and the turnout was fantastic. I had originally planned on about a 45-minute event, but the questions didn't stop coming until the hour and a half mark. One question was "Which Republican opponent do you fear the most?" I flipped that on its head and talked about which I would most want to face - because I believe they're both weak candidates and the __right__ Democrat has a very realistic shot at beating either one of them. The last question was "What can I do to help you get elected?" I have the experience, the skill set, and the message to win this seat. What I need most of all is the resources to get that message out across a nearly 8,000 square mile district. As negative and horrible as my opponent's message is likely to be, if he or she is screaming it through a megaphone and I'm only whispering, they'll win the day. We've got an aggressive goal to meet by the end of the month, [so please, help us get our message out with a contribution today](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17235658/187528177/-1907457918?refcode=04232020_em_line2&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMTdlODhlMS02ZDg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QCKf7Leu_v314RGJ_de27dcxy14ZPT7VPBNP-grKlnc=). name: Claire Chase for Congress
subject: New Ad Highlights Differences Between Pro-Trump Political Outsider Claire Chase and Career Politician Yvette Herrell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Claire Chase for Congress, Inc
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| New Ad Highlights Differences Between Pro-Trump Political Outsider Claire Chase and Failed Career Politician Yvette Herrell
---
| ROSWELL, NM - Today the Claire Chase campaign released an ad highlighting the differences between pro-Trump political outsider Claire Chase and failed career politician Yvette Herrell. Chase's latest ad comes after months of [sleazy attack ads](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VAozaHnMrb6nXJsH-fgH-kh0SoHzOJaY_SZOOyTluyigMuuB59o0-M2SpB6mEykXbcgiCq3QZVWBsyas3PdpRKb02j5mBfR2reZ1N-SpDRBhVmAUXDORa4AN98S2X5YvwP7k2PZmcESx8RtjHQzz-AJIipbgc65TuFhNzUJYdxM94xz9eKkO7pj3ppkh6w0qdwuxebbX1A4W6FeYUjjZyq1E7i3AaHysrZixksbPMfd8wQnMluS6O0sWQgYxsZsQ1Z_i7hYpk6Y=&c=HWKawM6bLRS5aXLLV4Htr3DYIcBTscZE-kaUcSW-7EV7izhzp24ygw==&ch=fJmlyT1xONZMfIc7OQ-02CAFBVUFSvR-ub3UKD6RbE8uUix3JJcN-Q==) by the Yvette Herrell campaign and takes aim at Herrell's record of supporting massive tax hikes and [undermining ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VAozaHnMrb6nXJsH-fgH-kh0SoHzOJaY_SZOOyTluyigMuuB59o0-BmGvseIhNCaJKGC-N7g35lK48HX7pkS9WVg0qAUnl0SvND0m3hQ84VaDnTY6QqnVVO9IxUONXEhUjotnxpsphJaaqi-0nexCY7BsfLvw6LBgThW-XeBY2LiC5fMcKTxZo26FAbPFEthoFGnHTEyHNjWhV8SWOwHA4xAZ_hTNxZxYU1B8wjTWRUzLWGk6HUnBAQd2oXTZmeYQkntt4mWIHAlKfLikbhAyxy5B031wom-yzobEghZM3s=&c=HWKawM6bLRS5aXLLV4Htr3DYIcBTscZE-kaUcSW-7EV7izhzp24ygw==&ch=fJmlyT1xONZMfIc7OQ-02CAFBVUFSvR-ub3UKD6RbE8uUix3JJcN-Q==)President Trump's campaign.
Chase Campaign Manager Mike Berg said, "Failed career politician Yvette Herrell said she supported President Trump from day one and promised not to raise taxes. Unfortunately Yvette lied, got caught undermining Trump's campaign for President, and broke with Republicans to support a massive tax hike on New Mexico families.
"In a time of crisis, we simply cannot afford another career politician who says one thing, then does another. Claire Chase is a political outsider who opposes tax increases and will always stand with President Trump and New Mexico families."
You can watch the ad [HERE](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VAozaHnMrb6nXJsH-fgH-kh0SoHzOJaY_SZOOyTluyigMuuB59o0-M2SpB6mEykXuyQZgrwxk1C4XaHIUROKQoBgUqWMbjSzpScIDxrQ2AGdzqrFg7n1yARQjg4XZoa6qNQ-dGHwE-ZR4TuODKWVVeEpS2DOZBIkz1Bm4LIvTdQUM8dYNmkJz-ZhG_E6uZA8Az56iSOK-a0=&c=HWKawM6bLRS5aXLLV4Htr3DYIcBTscZE-kaUcSW-7EV7izhzp24ygw==&ch=fJmlyT1xONZMfIc7OQ-02CAFBVUFSvR-ub3UKD6RbE8uUix3JJcN-Q==).

SCRIPT:
VO: The record is clear: career politician Yvette Herrell undermined Trump's campaign. VO: And after taking a pledge not to raise taxes, she voted for a massive tax hike. VO: Herrell's record of betraying New Mexico families and standing against President Trump must end. VO: New Mexico needs pro-Trump conservative Claire Chase. VO: Claire will stand with President Trump to build the wall and oppose tax increases. VO: Because Claire Chase is the pro-Trump conservative New Mexico can trust.
---
| ###
---
| [ClaireChase.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001VAozaHnMrb6nXJsH-fgH-kh0SoHzOJaY_SZOOyTluyigMuuB59o0-FAzKMg_urq0YzUx7oM4yCY7lAETNg_pMKSjcbMXG8mB_9XcPhofqswS7CfxDV8OP_fH7-6Ej8pmo3blNXDxc6rTIXDod1HNtw==&c=HWKawM6bLRS5aXLLV4Htr3DYIcBTscZE-kaUcSW-7EV7izhzp24ygw==&ch=fJmlyT1xONZMfIc7OQ-02CAFBVUFSvR-ub3UKD6RbE8uUix3JJcN-Q==)

Peter, **Once every ten years, we embark on a mission to count every person. Well, I’ve got some bad news — Texas is lagging behind in the Census count.** This may not seem like a big deal but the Census is critical to determine funding for our federal programs, how many congressional seats Texas receives, and much more. Our safety net funding—billions and billions of dollars—depends on our Census response. This Census year has seen a lot of difficulty. First, the Trump administration tried to sabotage the Census by adding xenophobic questions that, all the experts agreed, would hurt its accuracy. Now, we are living through a global pandemic that makes in-person counting impossible. This reality makes counting poor, rural, and minority communities especially difficult. [**That is why we are working to help boost Census participation. Fill out the Census today!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17236196/187538506/-557522054?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njc3ZDNmNS03Mjg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EAb8BWyJ2_BH-IWGSAmYtjQssmlb6dO6c7wHyhx0xxc=&emci=5577d3f5-7285-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=5677d3f5-7285-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172)

This issue is so important that we are hosting a livestream today with Alice Yi. Alice is a leader in the AAPI Complete Count committee, working to ensure that every community is represented in the Census count, and to guarantee federal funding for essential programs. Alice is also involved in local efforts to acquire PPE for health professionals and other essential workers. **[Join us today at 12:30CT to hear about this important work and how we can support it!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17236199/187538509/-2074015680?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82MzkwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1Njc3ZDNmNS03Mjg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EAb8BWyJ2_BH-IWGSAmYtjQssmlb6dO6c7wHyhx0xxc=&emci=5577d3f5-7285-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&emdi=5677d3f5-7285-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&ceid=6233172)** Fighting for you,

clean_body: Peter, Once every ten years, we embark on a mission to count every person. Well, I’ve got some bad news — Texas is lagging behind in the Census count. This may not seem like a big deal but the Census is critical to determine funding for our federal programs, how many congressional seats Texas receives, and much more. Our safety net funding—billions and billions of dollars—depends on our Census response. This Census year has seen a lot of difficulty. First, the Trump administration tried to sabotage the Census by adding xenophobic questions that, all the experts agreed, would hurt its accuracy. Now, we are living through a global pandemic that makes in-person counting impossible. This reality makes counting poor, rural, and minority communities especially difficult. This issue is so important that we are hosting a livestream today with Alice Yi. Alice is a leader in the AAPI Complete Count committee, working to ensure that every community is represented in the Census count, and to guarantee federal funding for essential programs. Alice is also involved in local efforts to acquire PPE for health professionals and other essential workers. Fighting for you, Mike Siegel ** = PO Box 2409 Austin, TX 78701

name: Adem Bunkeddeko
subject: Join me for a Virtual Town Hall on how Public Schools in our District are Adapting During COVID-19
body:
Peter,

I want to invite you to our next Virtual Town Hall about how public schools and students in our district are adapting during COVID-19. I will be joined by Dr. Sandra Soto, Dr. Tessa Beausejour and two high school students who attend Brooklyn Institute for Liberal Arts in Flatbush. Our discussion will focus on the disparate student experiences, how staff and administrators are coping, and how schools will need to adapt in order to provide enriching environments for students. Please forward this opportunity to those in your community who would be interested in this topic and submit questions you have for us in our registration form. We also encourage students to join!

Adem Bunkeddeko for Congress Virtual Town Hall with

Dr. Sandra Soto, Dr. Tessa Beausejour & Students from Brooklyn Institute for Liberal Arts

Discussion of the impact of COVID-19 on

public schools in NY-9

Monday, April 27, 2020

6:30-7:30PM EST

Zoom conferencing information will be shared with registered participants.

CLICK HERE TO RSVP docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSemdTyYN447K6VP38MQSuNf7Uy1w05nrP_PQTVcgmm4CX8cmw/viewform

Dr. Sandra Soto is the founding principal of PS 705 - Brooklyn Arts & Science Elementary School in our district. She recently retired after 27 years of service with the NY Department of Education. She served as a bilingual teacher, New Teacher Mentor, Staff Developer, and Literacy Coach prior to becoming a Principal.

Dr. Tessa Beausejour is a licensed clinical social worker, psychotherapist, educational leader, and expert on fostering a school culture that promotes inclusion and diversity. She worked closely with Dr. Soto at PS 705 as a school social worker, and together they created opportunities to ensure marginalized students felt included.

Lastly, we will have two high school seniors from Brooklyn Institute for Liberal Arts in Flatbush. They are both recipients of the Posse Scholarship to attend liberal arts colleges following their graduation.

I hope you will join us and thank you for your support.

Best,
Adem

We are relying on our 100%-grassroots-backed, = to make sure every Hoosier has the tools to vote by mail. Will you help us ensure that no one has to risk their health to vote in the primary? From: Zoe King <info@indems.org> Sent: Wednesday, April 22, 2020 5:37 AM To: Phil Johnson <info@indems.org> Subject: voting by mail (why it matters) Hey Peter -- Zoe here. This is literally a first of its kind opportunity. For the first time, every single voter can cast a ballot by mail. So, we want to get the word out to as many Hoosier Democrats as possible. That's why we created the 2020 Vote by Mail Fund. We're fundraising to support voter outreach like texting and digital campaigns to teach Hoosier Democrats how to vote by mail. But that isn't free. We're just under halfway to goal and need to raise just under $10,000. Every single donor that gives their first donation of the year to our Vote by Mail Fund will have their contribution TRIPLE MATCHED. Yep. Your first donation will count 3X. body:

|

Meanwhile, MJ spent the last year talking to thousands of Texans all over the state and building a massive grassroots team! Which side would you rather be on?

This team can WIN in November, but we're going to need your help to do it. **Donate now to help us reach our One Year Anniversary Goal of 365 new donors* before midnight to keep growing our team!**

name: Bill Olson
subject: I'm the solution to Nancy Pelosi
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug

Hi Peter,

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto.

I received an additional Army Commendation Medal for my meritorious service in liberating Kuwait during Operation Desert Shield and Operation Desert Storm, and in 2008 I was awarded the Bronze Star for exceptionally meritorious service during the global war on terror in Afghanistan. Here is my award:

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug

So you can imagine, being an Army lifer, that serving my country - protecting my country and our freedoms - is a VERY big deal to me!

I am NOT a career politician.... Just someone who spent most of his adult life, risking my life for your freedom.

And seeing what Nancy Pelosi and Darren Soto- career politicians both- are pulling on the country is more than I can bear!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug

You may have seen that Pelosi's Democrats - like Soto - went too far, trying to “never let a crisis go to waste”.

Nancy Pelosi fiddled while the country's economy burned. As over 20 million Americans went on unemployment because the country's economy arrested due to the Coronavirus crisis, Pelosi and Soto saw fit to play partisan games with the American people:

In a call that included 200 members of the House Democratic caucus Thursday, lawmakers brainstormed their progressive non-COVID-19-related wish list to be included in the COVID-19 relief bill. Their ideas spanned increased Social Security benefits, extra funding for infrastructure, and in the event the Wuhan virus stretches into the November election timeline, funding for state-run, all-mail voting programs.

“This is a tremendous opportunity to restructure things to fit our vision,” Majority Whip James Clyburn, D-S.C., said to the caucus members, according to a source on the call.

As millions of Americans struggle to make ends meet and look to their elected officials for direction and hope, House Democrats remain steadfast in their opposition to President Donald Trump and the rest of the GOP and in their dedication to pushing a radical progressive policy agenda, no matter the cost to their hurting constituents.

This Coronavirus is the Democrats' dream. They get to spend government money like monopoly money, on "priorities" like illegal immigrants, the Kennedy Center, on Harvard University, on the Green New Deal.... and NOT on helping Americans who desperately need help.

Understand, that government intentionally caused harm to people by shutting down the country’s economy to fight the Wuhan Virus. So President Trump was trying to help the American people get by.

But Nancy wouldn’t let him!

And Darren Soto? He released the most partisan, hate-filled screed to line right up behind anti-American Nancy Pelosi:

As if his mishandling of the U.S. coronavirus response wasn’t bad enough, President Donald Trump has now called for steep bailouts for multinational corporations affected by the coronavirus. This goes too far. The Republicans already hindered our ability to respond to an economic crisis by doubling our national deficit to $1 trillion with their ill-conceived 2017 tax cuts to big businesses and the wealthiest Americans during what was then a good economy.

These extremists only want a dishonest way to enact their unpopular agenda- except, it's not cheap, their agenda is REALLY unpopular, and they didn't want to do ANYTHING to help the average American suffering because of the Coronavirus crisis.

This is all part of the Democrats' War on America. They want to help their Socialist buddies and make life bad for you. Can you help me stop them?

I’m a fighter and I love my country and my fellow citizens! I have been fighting for America my whole adult life.

Now I want to take that fighting spirit to Congress- and Nancy Pelosi and her band of Socialists like Darren Soto don’t stand a chance.

Liberal Democrat Darren Soto did not serve in the military. Instead, he votes with AOC and her anti-American "Squad" over 95% of the time!

Soto is Nancy Pelosi's lap dog - he sold his voting card to her a long time ago!

What really upsets me is that Soto's Democrats went all-in on impeaching the President. They have become SO radicalized, they impeached the President for nothing more than political payback!

-Because they were off pursuing their vicious impeachment fantasies, they left the country ill prepared for the Wuhan Virus breakout.

-When President Trump cut off travel to and from China, they called him a racist!

-And now, when he stops immigration completely so that we may recover, they call him a “fascist”.

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug

I say, ENOUGH! This man has done nothing but look out for the American People, and all the Dems do is obstruct and call names!

I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress.

Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have fancy refrigerators full of $15 designer ice cream, like Nancy Pelosi.

I earned my education in the Cold War frontiers of Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies!

Let's be clear- there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida.

Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance. Plus, it's now President Trump's home state!

Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution- and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto.

If so, then I need your help!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug

Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President!

Can you help me?

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug
of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto!

The Democrats are going to lose this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=fwJWxOvC__6OuRU&b=cqZLYzABhhCxWz844OlQug
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

clean_body: Bill Olson for Congress Hi Peter, My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet running to take back a Swing district- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto. I received an additional Army Commendation Medal for my meritorious service in liberating Kuwait during Operation Desert Shield and Operation Desert Storm, and in 2008 I was awarded the Bronze Star for exceptionally meritorious service during the global war on terror in Afghanistan. Here is my award: Image So you can imagine, being an Army lifer, that serving my country - protecting my country and our freedoms - is a VERY big deal to me! I am NOT a career politician.... Just someone who spent most of his adult life, risking my life for your freedom. And seeing what Nancy Pelosi and Darren Soto- career politicians both- are pulling on the country is more than I can bear! Image You may have seen that Pelosi's Democrats - like Soto - went too far, trying to “never let a crisis go to waste”. Nancy Pelosi fiddled while the country's economy burned. As over 20 million Americans went on unemployment because the country's economy arrested due to the Coronavirus crisis, Pelosi and Soto saw fit to play partisan games with the American people: In a call that included 200 members of the House Democratic caucus Thursday, lawmakers brainstormed their progressive non-COVID-19-related wish list to be included in the COVID-19 relief bill. Their ideas spanned increased Social Security benefits, extra funding for infrastructure, and in the event the Wuhan virus stretches into the November election timeline, funding for state-run, all-mail voting programs. “This is a tremendous opportunity to restructure things to fit our vision,” Majority Whip James Clyburn, D-S.C., said to the caucus members, according to a source on the call. As millions of Americans struggle to make ends meet and look to their elected officials for direction and hope, House Democrats remain steadfast in their opposition to President Donald Trump and the rest of the GOP and in their dedication to pushing a radical progressive policy agenda, no matter the cost to their hurting constituents. This Coronavirus is the Democrats' dream. They get to spend government money like monopoly money, on "priorities" like illegal immigrants, the Kennedy Center, on Harvard University, on the Green New Deal.... and NOT on helping Americans who desperately need help. Understand, that government intentionally caused harm to people by shutting down the country’s economy to fight the Wuhan Virus. So President Trump was trying to help the American people get by. But Nancy wouldn’t let him! And Darren Soto? He released the most partisan, hate-filled screed to line right up behind anti-American Nancy Pelosi: As if his mishandling of the U.S. coronavirus response wasn’t bad enough, President Donald Trump has now called for steep bailouts for multinational corporations affected by the coronavirus. This goes too far. The Republicans already hindered our ability to respond to an economic crisis by doubling our national deficit to $1 trillion with their ill-conceived 2017 tax cuts to big businesses and the wealthiest Americans during what was then a good economy. These extremists only want a dishonest way to enact their unpopular agenda- except, it's not cheap, their agenda is REALLY unpopular, and they didn't want to do ANYTHING to help the average American suffering because of the Coronavirus crisis. This is all part of the Democrats' War on America. They want to help their Socialist buddies and make life bad for you. Can you help me stop them? I’m a fighter and I love my country and my fellow citizens! I have been fighting for America my whole adult life. Now I want to take that fighting spirit to Congress- and Nancy Pelosi and her band of Socialists like Darren Soto don’t stand a chance. Liberal Democrat Darren Soto did not serve in the military. Instead, he votes with AOC and her anti-American "Squad" over 95% of the time! Soto is Nancy Pelosi's lap dog - he sold his voting card to her a long time ago! What really upsets me is that Soto's Democrats went all-in on impeaching the President. They have become SO radicalized, they impeached the President for nothing more than political payback! -Because they were off pursuing their vicious impeachment fantasies, they left the country ill prepared for the Wuhan Virus breakout. -When President Trump cut off travel to and from China, they called him a racist! -And now, when he stops immigration completely so that we may recover, they call him a “fascist”. Image I say, ENOUGH! This man has done nothing but look out for the American People, and all the Dems do is obstruct and call names! I think those who have laid the most on the line for our country and its citizens- whose who have taken an Oath to defend the Constitution- are the ones best fit to defend our Constitution in Congress. Me, I’m not a career politician. I don't have fancy refrigerators full of $15 designer ice cream, like Nancy Pelosi. I earned my education in the Cold War frontiers of Germany and South Korea, as well as the battlefields of Kuwait, Iraq, and Afghanistan. That's why I'm 100% behind the President's "America First" policies! Let's be clear- there is NO Republican win in 2020 without Florida. Florida is so pivotal. The electoral votes, along with so many Republican-leaning and swing congressional districts, make this state of paramount importance. Plus, it's now President Trump's home state! Perhaps you agree with me, that we need more Bible, more Constitution- and less crazy liberal Democrats like Darren Soto. If so, then I need your help! Darren Soto will have all of Nancy Pelosi's Swamp money. That's why I need your help today- to replace Darren Soto, and support the President! Can you help me? Can I count on you for a donation of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2800 per individual, $5600 per couple? I need whatever you can send so we can defeat socialist Darren Soto! The Democrats are going to lose this year - with your help! Let's get this done! Image Bill Olson Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars Supports President Trump Not a Career Politician Hard Core Conservative Fighter Image P.S. I really need your help today , so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP! Thank you and God bless America! - Bill. PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. clean_body: | Help us reach 100,000 individual donations by midnight tomorrow. Every dollar will help us fight back against GOP attacks, so we can flip this Senate seat blue! If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Hello — I am about to ask you to make a donation to help our grassroots campaign reach 100,000 individual online donations before tomorrow at midnight. But first, I want to take a moment to explain what this means for our campaign. When I announced I was running for Senate, I knew dark money forces with ties to Republicans were going to spend huge sums of money trying to tear us down. I was right. They’ve already spent an outrageous amount in misleading attack ads, and other Washington Republican groups are booking millions more in the coming weeks. But every individual contribution our campaign collects from grassroots supporters like you helps us fight back and sends a powerful message that our country is fed up with the inaction and partisan paralysis in Washington. If we can meet this goal by tomorrow night — 100,000 contributions in just a few months — it will only amplify that message and put us one significant step closer to flipping this seat blue. Can I count on you to make a contribution of $10 or more to help us reach 100,000 individual donations to our campaign? Any amount will make a difference for our team: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = With climate change threatening our future, skyrocketing health care costs, and an unprecedented pandemic and economic recession, now is the time for a different approach for our country. Thank you for being part of this extraordinary team. — John Paid for by Hickenlooper for Colorado Hickenlooper for Colorado PO Box 18886 Denver, CO 80218 United States

| Friends, Good News! Yesterday the New Hampshire Superior Court [granted Governor Sununu’s motion to dismiss](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA1ODExMzkyNzA3MDQwNzEyJmM9ZzJ5MSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDA3NzY2NTQmZD1oOXg5bTht.uJ7Rsd-zT7zfUQyN8-VWeUqlaCUfCSO6TyS3X6_T-vE) the lawsuit filed by New Hampshire Democratic legislators regarding federal relief funding for the state’s COVID-19 response.
---

| |
---
| “Unfortunately, the lawsuit filed by Concord Democratic leaders could have put in jeopardy financial relief for hard hit hospitals, losing chances to purchase personal protective equipment for front line workers and delaying resources to critical services. Now it is time for everyone, regardless of political party, to come together and get the assistance needed to the hard-working people and small businesses of New Hampshire.” - Senate Republican Leader Chuck Morse (R-Salem).
---
---
| |
---
| It is critical for Governor Sununu to be able to react quickly during the current pandemic to make the best decisions for New Hampshire. **The Democrats put partisanship above the people of New Hampshire by filing this lawsuit.** We can't let the Democrats keep playing political games with these important relief funds! [Will you help the NH Senate Republicans retake the Majority by pledging $10, $25 or even $100?](https://click.ml.mailersend.com/link/c/YT0xNDA1ODExMzkyNzA3MDQwNzEyJmM9ZzJ5MSZlPTE5MjgmYj0zNDA3NzY2NTYmZD1wNGgxcTJp.jxorPDemm9vfmb-tx1NjZfRXn176h9gZp_naMkUuVzo) We hope that we can now move past this issue and continue to get the people and businesses of New Hampshire the relief they need.

\- The New Hampshire Senate Republicans

name: Nicole Malliotakis
subject: Our Future
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY NICOLE FOR NEW YORK (FEDERAL)
body:
Friends- For the past seven weeks, our campaign has been on pause. My focus has been where it needs to be... on getting our community prepared and helping my constituents get protective equipment and supplies, apply for unemployment, and understand the programs that could help their businesses. The Coronavirus has impacted the lives of every American and has disrupted almost every aspect of our way of life. While we respond, adapt and work toward restoring normalcy, we cannot turn a blind eye to the fact that we have an important election this November.
| | | | [](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=143A192A1A2369)
---
| | |
---
| | Friends-

For the past seven weeks, our campaign has been on pause.

My focus has been where it needs to be... on getting our community prepared and helping my constituents get protective equipment and supplies, apply for unemployment, and understand the programs that could help their businesses.

The Coronavirus has impacted the lives of every American and has disrupted almost every aspect of our way of life. While we respond, adapt and work toward restoring normalcy, we cannot turn a blind eye to the fact that we have an important election this November.

[Those we elect a few months from now will be the leaders who lift our nation out of this crisis, restore our economy, put Americans back to work, and fix the flaws in our healthcare system for the future.](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=143A192A1A2377)

---
| | |
---
| | [ HELP US WIN IN 2020 ](https://nicolemalliotakis.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=e671297fc19753f4b1f2ae7718aefd90&i=143A192A1A2377)
---
| | |
---
| | We simply cannot have Nancy Pelosi, Alexandria Ocasio Cortez and Adam Schiff in control of the House of Representatives serving as obstructionists for another two years.

Our election was important before. It is even more important now.

In Congress, I will partner with President Trump to jump start our economy as we recover from this pandemic and work to improve our patient-centered healthcare system, reducing costs, enhancing care, and ensuring New York has the resources it needs.

I want to go to Washington and fight for our families and community and I’m counting on your ongoing support to get there. Together, we will continue to overcome this challenge and those that will arise in its aftermath.

Sincerely,

---
| |
---
| | Nicole Malliotakis

name: Team Booker
subject: Mitch's "relief" plan: Go bankrupt.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
We've beat bullies before.
#
The COVID-19 pandemic has caused untold human suffering worldwide. Here in the U.S., we're seeing record unemployment, supply shortages, mounting deaths, and stressed emergency and medical services. States need immediate, drastic relief to tackle these issues.
**Yet Mitch McConnell's COVID-19 relief proposal for states and cities? Go bankrupt.**
Take a look at this transcript from when Mitch was on Hugh Hewitt's radio show:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17241053/187633331/198088407?refcode=em20200423-screenshot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y5NzA2MS05Nzg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VUAKL7Pnt0KLmz7aeitVrc3wC_Oro6OAo1pZeO3reI=)
Make no mistake, bankrupting cities and states means that teachers, firefighters, sanitation workers, police officers, social workers, and all sorts of other public employees would be in danger of losing their jobs _and_ their retirement. It would send an already dire economic situation into a complete financial meltdown for millions of working families who serve their communities every day.
Every day, our task of making sure this evil man doesn't see another term grows larger. It's time we kick this bully out of Senate – for good. **[Will you chip in $5 to join this fight to defeat Mitch McConnell and flip the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17241067/187633345/198088407?refcode=em20200423&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y5NzA2MS05Nzg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VUAKL7Pnt0KLmz7aeitVrc3wC_Oro6OAo1pZeO3reI=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17241068/187633346/198088407?refcode=em20200423&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y5NzA2MS05Nzg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VUAKL7Pnt0KLmz7aeitVrc3wC_Oro6OAo1pZeO3reI=)****
But here are the two silver linings amidst this chaos:
1. We've driven bullies like Mitch McConnell out of office before. (See: Former Governor of Kentucky Matt Bevin)
2. This is an election year, and political experts are saying this is the strongest chance we've had in years to turn Kentucky blue.

And make no mistake: Charles is our strongest chance at real change this election.
Charles proudly champions people-focused policies and has demonstrated the courage to stand up to the corporate forces that have dominated our politics for too long. He's the only real Democrat in this race who holds true progressive values, like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and a universal basic income.
We have a chance this election year to drive Mitch out of office – but we have to fight for it. **[Can you help us seize this moment and chip in $5, $15, or whatever you can to our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17241082/187633360/198088407?refcode=em20200423&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y5NzA2MS05Nzg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VUAKL7Pnt0KLmz7aeitVrc3wC_Oro6OAo1pZeO3reI=)**
****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17241083/187633361/198088407?refcode=em20200423&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyM2Y5NzA2MS05Nzg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3VUAKL7Pnt0KLmz7aeitVrc3wC_Oro6OAo1pZeO3reI=)****
Thank you for always rising to the occasion. Together, we can take back Kentucky, and drive Mitch McConnell out for good.
— Team Booker

clean_body: We've beat bullies before. The COVID-19 pandemic has caused untold human suffering worldwide. Here in the U.S., we're seeing record unemployment, supply shortages, mounting deaths, and stressed emergency and medical services. States need immediate, drastic relief to tackle these issues. Yet Mitch McConnell's COVID-19 relief proposal for states and cities? Go bankrupt. Take a look at this transcript from when Mitch was on Hugh Hewitt's radio show: = Make no mistake, bankrupting cities and states means that teachers, firefighters, sanitation workers, police officers, social workers, and all sorts of other public employees would be in danger of losing their jobs and their retirement. It would send an already dire economic situation into a complete financial meltdown for millions of working families who serve their communities every day. Every day, our task of making sure this evil man doesn't see another term grows larger. It's time we kick this bully out of Senate – for good. = **= But here are the two silver linings amidst this chaos: 1. We've driven bullies like Mitch McConnell out of office before. (See: Former Governor of Kentucky Matt Bevin) 2. This is an election year, and political experts are saying this is the strongest chance we've had in years to turn Kentucky blue. And make no mistake: Charles is our strongest chance at real change this election. Charles proudly champions people-focused policies and has demonstrated the courage to stand up to the corporate forces that have dominated our politics for too long. He's the only real Democrat in this race who holds true progressive values, like Medicare for All, a Green New Deal, and a universal basic income. We have a chance this election year to drive Mitch out of office – but we have to fight for it. = = Thank you for always rising to the occasion. Together, we can take back Kentucky, and drive Mitch McConnell out for good. — Team Booker =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Liberal Media Bias on Full Display During White House's COVID-19 Press Briefings
body:
“Media's slant is likely a major factor contributing to the decline of newspapers and broadcast news ratings.” | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=3992447349&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Liberal Media Bias on Full Display During White House's COVID-19 Press Briefings**

“Media's slant is likely a major factor contributing to the decline of newspapers and broadcast news ratings,” Cal Thomas writes in _The Washington Times_.

“Watching the daily White House press briefings about the virus appears to have put reporters’ biases on naked display . . . And then there is the media’s most potent power—the power to ignore certain stories.”

[Click here to read more.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=267dd36c3d&e=3ee4985eea)

**MORE:** [“CDC Director Takes WaPo to Task Over an 'Inappropriate' Coronavirus Headline”](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=06646b5fff&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| President Trump signed a proclamation yesterday temporarily suspending immigration into the United States, a response to the economic crisis caused by the Coronavirus. The President said this action "will ensure that unemployed Americans of all backgrounds will be first in line for jobs as our economy reopens.” Read more from Barbara Sprunt in _[NPR.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=13b174117d&e=3ee4985eea)_
---
|
---
| “Harvard University said it will not take the $8.6 million in aid [that] was granted as part of the U.S. government’s efforts to cushion the economic impact of the coronavirus lockdown, reversing itself and bending to U.S. President Donald Trump who said Tuesday that the university should not take the money,” John Carney reports for [_Breitbart_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cf54683b27&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Thirty-four nurses from Colorado landed at Newark Airport on Tuesday afternoon and after a short prayer service headed off to three New Jersey hospitals hit hard by the coronavirus to lend a hand. The nurses, from Centura Health System, part of Catholic Health Initiatives, agreed to travel to New Jersey after its president, Peter Banko, received an appeal from his counterparts in the state,” Matt Fagan reports for [NorthJersey.com](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1fa98a31df&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d0850d8a07&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=1ad001ca68&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=e16f9ce079)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---

The nurses, from Centura Health System, part of Catholic Health Initiatives, agreed to travel to New Jersey after its president, Peter Banko, received an appeal from his counterparts in the state,” Matt Fagan reports for . | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Making Medicare for All a reality [add your name]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts
body:
| [](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639019c/55b66746/20507cfd/80e669a/1528827897/VEsH/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "http://www.kennedyforma.com/")
---

| | When Joe co-sponsored Medicare for All in Congress, he didn't know the toll COVID-19 would take on this country. What he did know was that our health care system was broken. That too many folks were being priced out of life-saving care. That health care workers across the country weren't treated with the respect they deserved. And that in the wealthiest country on earth, everyone should be able to keep the people they love healthy and whole. **Health care has been the fight of Joe's career. He is running for Senate because the stakes have never been higher. We need the strongest leadership possible to ensure our system can take care of every single person in need -- especially now. ** Joe's fight for a better, more affordable, and more equitable health care system isn't something new. It isn't something he picked up because it's an election year. He has been on the frontlines of our health care fights for the past eight years.
* He led House Democrats in stopping Donald Trump's attempts to completely undo the ACA.
* Passed a bill to extend care to low-income children and pregnant women.
* Increased funding for substance-use treatment in MA and across the country.
* Taken on the pharmaceutical companies to lower prescription drug pricing,
* Tirelessly fought discrimination against transgender patients, patients of color, patients with pre-existing conditions, and patients seeking access to mental health and addiction care.

**Are you with Joe in fighting for Medicare for All? Together we can create a pathway to a better and more equitable health care system. Sign your name if you're with Joe:** [Sign the Petition](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/3639019c/55b66746/20507cfd/80e669b/1528827897/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/s/we-need-medicare-for-all") What we are saying is this: health care isn't just one of many issues for Joe. It's THE issue. There is nothing he has or he will fight harder for than this. Just look at his record. We hope you're staying safe and healthy during these unprecedented times. Be well. And let's keep fighting. Team Kennedy |
---|---|---

| | Paid for by Kennedy for Massachusetts.
---|---

- He’s ensured our military is well-funded, trained, and equipped for battle
- And, his administration is combating cyberattacks by foreign governments and rogue nations.Finally, we have a President who KEEPS his promises to put AMERICA FIRST.

name: Teresa Tomlinson
subject: So Georgia is back open for business...
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE
body:
| |

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17241633/187653529/-779694663?refcode=em042320-header&refcode2=ce086dae-9f85-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTA4NmRhZS05Zjg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVlVoAuZfA3BFbhGmT3Mhn__DogqZ8a79eQwGBL3OI4=) **** | | Friends, I never trusted a politician who pointed a gun at a teenager in a TV ad, but this disregard for public health is beyond the pale.

Georgia Governor Brian Kemp’s decision to reopen gyms, barber shops, tattoo parlors, movie theaters and bowling alleys as soon as this week spits in the face of public health experts who recommended waiting and condemns more Georgians to sickness and death. The GOP isn’t even denying that part. They’re just forcing working people to choose between a paycheck and a clean bill of health since Mitch McConnell won’t send taxpayers monthly cash relief.

This is a moment where it would be really important for Georgia to have U.S. senators who had not disgraced themselves in an insider trading scandal. Unfortunately, Kelly Loeffler and my opponent David Perdue received critical public health information, but instead of warning and preparing the public, they began trading stocks to protect their financial self-interest, all the while downplaying the public threat. After 8 years as a mayor and public safety director, I would have made very different choices than David Perdue over the last several months.

**I’ve rolled up my sleeves as a mayor and reformed a public pension, an employee healthcare system, and balanced a city budget when we couldn’t print money at the Treasury to solve our problems — and we made Columbus one of the 25 best run cities in America by the time I left office in 2018.**

[**This race is deadlocked and you can make the difference that pushes us over the top in this primary. We have what it takes to beat Perdue this November but I need you with me right now. Donate and help show Georgia what real public service is all about.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17241634/187653584/-779694663?refcode=em042320-a&refcode2=ce086dae-9f85-ea11-a94c-00155d03b1e8&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NDI2NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTA4NmRhZS05Zjg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVlVoAuZfA3BFbhGmT3Mhn__DogqZ8a79eQwGBL3OI4=) | |

clean_body: | | | | = ** | | Friends, I never trusted a politician who pointed a gun at a teenager in a TV ad, but this disregard for public health is beyond the pale. Georgia Governor Brian Kemp’s decision to reopen gyms, barber shops, tattoo parlors, movie theaters and bowling alleys as soon as this week spits in the face of public health experts who recommended waiting and condemns more Georgians to sickness and death. The GOP isn’t even denying that part. They’re just forcing working people to choose between a paycheck and a clean bill of health since Mitch McConnell won’t send taxpayers monthly cash relief. This is a moment where it would be really important for Georgia to have U.S. senators who had not disgraced themselves in an insider trading scandal. Unfortunately, Kelly Loeffler and my opponent David Perdue received critical public health information, but instead of warning and preparing the public, they began trading stocks to protect their financial self-interest, all the while downplaying the public threat. After 8 years as a mayor and public safety director, I would have made very different choices than David Perdue over the last several months. I’ve rolled up my sleeves as a mayor and reformed a public pension, an employee healthcare system, and balanced a city budget when we couldn’t print money at the Treasury to solve our problems — and we made Columbus one of the 25 best run cities in America by the time I left office in 2018. = | | If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = Thank you, Teresa PAID FOR BY TERESA TOMLINSON FOR SENATE PMB 263, 3201 Macon Rd Ste 139, Columbus, GA 31906 =

name: Young Kim
subject: Let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Young Kim for Congress
body:
We need our grassroots supporters now more than ever. On Election Night, we came out on top and proved we have the momentum to win -- but now we have a target on our backs.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-ECnM5nVshbYnth_peybd14GPKzhc_gXmOnoadGcNxH_y499ecRm6iQEwymacStOTPl4gbYbikxwwxPdRdVihX-x0t7x0XMu-qc19GNdN1QQRUyaHiLVgrzgNRRWliLnVBBRhvYCEQFZ0nBNFIzUxq1u0yhHcTasRpXPii1kYKedHtiCzjTVL4ILhwifrvIpcNIyBscXn9R4rhDBRxx0FvjDJfq-bxgaLpd2Mwl3FVubZpQ6DKQx9ytPrKzIyaBNhMNUt8-skxq7HLRjcGPwIOlohjdahtboxkh4rtg8GkTjs8EQ6YoPEToi1sKJXLnwdLXTfzqns75qJgfWgehOlekvk9h1N3mkt2rM_0X241PAs1pk7Nu5Kw==&c=bu_4RkYT4OSTgaGRchiWTK3e-r_I4eeLxD1W49O_cLu7E4rmzhgMQQ==&ch=1v5OSrvze7072hSvRyXahZ7Zp-wUTAeTlPpWP2Klb06QQg8ddal1jw==) Friend, in a moment I'm going to ask you for a favor. But first, I hope you will give me a chance to explain why it's so important.

We need our grassroots supporters now more than ever. On Election Night, we came out on top and proved we have the momentum to win -- but now we have a target on our backs.
* **This seat is a TOP TARGET** : It's one of very few that will determine who controls the House Majority. Democrats know it just as well as we do, that's why they're already organizing against us
* **This seat is a MUST FLIP** : It was only recently flipped blue by Nancy Pelosi and our opponent in 2018 and POLITICO is calling it a _toss-up._
* **This seat is a MUST WIN** : That's why we have to keep fighting.

[**We still have a long road ahead of us and so much work to do. That 's why I am asking you to make a donation of $5 to keep us in the fight.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-ECnM5nVshbYnth_peybd14GPKzhc_gXmOnoadGcNxH_y499ecRm6tOrAYt-sgc61wYQeS_7UmCXXpEfeqeeKRcBHQrYp1DyPSLAly3QkBCcNeCynv75YN-uQBQmtHV7yntrl7b3LhqQ4z33EhbwJh-6FooOnnT0fmaXbcnjcNbQvqhF7E9mYxc7hd2H10baR4EoqSzY5Fl401XSMCeyFe7eWXGRkZGJQd2PAngiPhkmERhosMH2RiM25YvlpQA2AA_EHUqD6ro8dTrH9Ow92lCl-CRhiuOoqkqAoIws3Z228ee8Nu81bBV0IqxsAEwi3w642fVPo31OP5JS_6f1Kg3ORmdoBA9sAN-l-e-u_nq0Q9y4IYZqcg==&c=bu_4RkYT4OSTgaGRchiWTK3e-r_I4eeLxD1W49O_cLu7E4rmzhgMQQ==&ch=1v5OSrvze7072hSvRyXahZ7Zp-wUTAeTlPpWP2Klb06QQg8ddal1jw==) Your contribution means we'll be better able to ensure we have the resources we need to keep this campaign up and running.

We can't leave anything to chance. This election will be close, decided by only a handful of votes. Your support could mean the difference between winning and losing. [**Your support will give us the means to run a strong, successful campaign no matter what.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-ECnM5nVshbYnth_peybd14GPKzhc_gXmOnoadGcNxH_y499ecRm6iQEwymacStOTPl4gbYbikxwwxPdRdVihX-x0t7x0XMu-qc19GNdN1QQRUyaHiLVgrzgNRRWliLnVBBRhvYCEQFZ0nBNFIzUxq1u0yhHcTasRpXPii1kYKedHtiCzjTVL4ILhwifrvIpcNIyBscXn9R4rhDBRxx0FvjDJfq-bxgaLpd2Mwl3FVubZpQ6DKQx9ytPrKzIyaBNhMNUt8-skxq7HLRjcGPwIOlohjdahtboxkh4rtg8GkTjs8EQ6YoPEToi1sKJXLnwdLXTfzqns75qJgfWgehOlekvk9h1N3mkt2rM_0X241PAs1pk7Nu5Kw==&c=bu_4RkYT4OSTgaGRchiWTK3e-r_I4eeLxD1W49O_cLu7E4rmzhgMQQ==&ch=1v5OSrvze7072hSvRyXahZ7Zp-wUTAeTlPpWP2Klb06QQg8ddal1jw==)

Thank you for fighting with us.

Young Kim

Schumer is even directing well-funded, far-Left donors all across the country to pour money into our state to flip Iowa blue. " Democrats' momentum puts Senate majority in play" Politico.com. April 20, 2020 " Democrats strengthened their hand with a slate of challengers raising massive sums of money in races that represent the heart of the battle for the majority, putting control of the Senate within reach." \---- That's right, Friend, Democrats are gaining ground in the fight for the Senate Majority. Not only are Democrats raising record sums of money, but Chuck Schumer is also pulling out all of the stops to elect his handpicked candidate here in Iowa. Just this week, Schumer admitted Democrats must win Iowa if they're going to flip the Senate. Then, his handpicked candidate broke fundraising records for the SECOND time in Iowa. We have asked for your support before, but there has never been a time more important than now that you step up and help us stop Chuck Schumer from buying the Senate Majority outright. subject: Republican Hirsh Singh Condemns Fake Study Against Hydroxychloroquine
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SINGH FOR SENATE
body:
"I come from a STEM background and one look at the paper was enough to notice the fraudulent nature of this paper. This was no clinical trial... | | | Dear Friend,

Democrats have been caught in yet _another_ one of their stunts. What else is new?

One thing is for sure — this COVID-19 ordeal affects us all, and in some cases, the consequences can be deadly.

Take a look at my team's press release below. You won't believe your eyes — these Big Pharma cronies are literally willing to gamble with your life to maintain their power. That's why we have to keep fighting back.

-Hirsh
---
| | [ ](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=5af0e03e0b&e=3e017fab0f)
---
|
---
| April 23rd, 2020
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE**
Contact: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)
---
| |
# Republican Hirsh Singh Condemns Fake Study Against HydroxyChloroquine

**LINWOOD, NJ** — Republican candidate for U.S. Senate strongly condemned a group of activists who abused their academic titles and published a paper purporting to be a study allegedly proving that the anti-malaria drug hydroxychloroquine was ineffective against COVID-19. The first author of the so-called study is Joseph Magagnoli, a statistician. Other key contributors are ophthalmologists.

"I come from a STEM background and one look at the paper was enough to notice the fraudulent nature of this paper. This was no clinical trial under a controlled environment, but retrofitting of a preconceived conclusion on data about 368 patients obtained from multiple sources from all over the country. This is terrible, the book 'Lies, Damned Lies and Statistics' comes to mind" said Hirsh Singh.

The so-called study seems to have been cooked up by the authors for no other reason other than to appease their political masters and oppose President Donald Trump. "They should have been honest and listed the authors as Nancy Pelosi, Cory Booker and Barack Obama," said Hirsh Singh.

Singh pointed out that in the absence of any cure, the reports from the ground about the effectiveness of hydroxychloroquine must be taken seriously and patients given a chance to live. The use of hydroxychloroquine has faced opposition from the pharmaceutical industry which has claimed that the only cure for COVID-19 is one developed by them. "This is a shame," pointed out Singh before adding, "The real message here is that the only cure that is acceptable is one for which Big Pharma gets paid Big Money." Singh's opponent in the primary is Rik Mehta who is a part of Big Pharma and has been curiously silent on the effectiveness of hydroxychloroquine.

In early April, when India had an embargo on the export of hydroxychloroquine as it needed the drug for use locally, Hirsh Singh then wrote a letter to India's Prime Minister Narendra Modi urging him to release the drug for use in the United States. India has since permitted the export of the drug to the United States. "The reason I wrote the letter to the Indian Prime Minister is because I had been hearing from doctors that hydroxychloroquine was having a positive effect on patients affected by COVID-19. The world is fortunate to have President Trump and Prime Minister Modi as leaders at the same time," said Singh.
###
---
| For any inquiries, please reply to this message or send an email to: [press@hirshsingh.com](mailto:press@hirshsingh.com?subject=RE%3A%2011-09-19%20Press%20Release)

Additional information is available on our [official website](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=ec4968059e&e=3e017fab0f) and [Facebook](https://hirshsingh.us15.list-manage.com/track/click?u=978b8670b44783121d15ac87e&id=613ff9657e&e=3e017fab0f) page.

Thank you,
**The Singh for Senate Press Team**
_For the People_

This is absurd, but that's what Trump just did with the World Health Organization (WHO) -- **now we need your help to protect the WHO.**

[Add your name and demand that Trump not cut funding for the WHO->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4cca/4bd7760e/5a81e1d7/77af4194/3306400036/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/trump-who-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=3+-+Add+your+name+and+demand+that+Trump+not+&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200423_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_protectwho&source=314_EM_PT_200423_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_protectwho&refcode=314_EM_PT_200423_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_protectwho")

Listen, this is just par for the course for Trump. Yesterday, Trump fired a vaccine expert because he questioned Trump's pseudoscience nonsense.

Right now, we need to rely on science and experts to help us get back to normal. **Trump does not see it that way -- and that is unacceptable.**

[If you're fed up with Trump's actions, then add your name and demand Trump not cut funding for the WHO->](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4cca/4bd7760e/5a81e1d7/77af4192/3306400036/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IiJ9/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.314action.org/page/s/trump-who-funding?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=5+-+If+yoursquore+fed+up+with+Trumprsquos+ac&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200423_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_protectwho&source=314_EM_PT_200423_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_protectwho&refcode=314_EM_PT_200423_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_protectwho")

Now we're focused on flipping the US Senate, defeating 25 climate deniers in Congress and flipping key state legislatures across the country.

If you'd like to support 314 Action, you can **[click here](https://secure.314action.org/page/m/29bb4cca/4bd7760e/5a81e1d7/77af419f/3306400036/VEsO/?g=v87XQ8Qot1BdKB-_uknky5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/314-emfooter?refcode=emfooter&utm_medium=email&utm_source=naughton&utm_content=8+-+click+here&utm_campaign=314_EM_PT_200423_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_protectwho&source=314_EM_PT_200423_1MC_1M5XAT_STD_2_protectwho")** to make a donation.

name: Congressman Seth Moulton
subject: Why I support Nikki Foster
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Foster for Ohio
body:
---
| | I know first-hand how military leadership skills translate into effective lawmaking. [](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=1&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1") Hello everyone. I'm emailing you today to ask you to take another step in supporting Nikki Foster for Congress. Taking the first step is never easy, but often, it's absolutely necessary. That's what I learned when I decided to join the U.S. Marine Corps shortly after graduating in 2001. Little did I know that within months, tragedy would strike on 9/11. I also could not have predicted that a few short years later, I would lead one of the first platoons to enter Baghdad after the fall of Saddam Hussein. Later in life, I was called to take another big step and run to represent my home district in Massachusetts in the United States Congress. I've represented my constituents proudly for five years. **None of it would have been possible without taking that first step to serve my country.** Please, take another step with me today and contribute to Nikki's campaign. She needs to raise $25,000 before her vote-by-mail election ends this Tuesday. [**Will you pitch in and help us move toward a better future for all?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=2+-+Will+you+pitch+in+and+help+us+move+towar&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1") | | | [Chip in $25 ->](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=3+-+Chip+in+25+rarr&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1")
