I know first-hand how military leadership skills translate into effective lawmaking. **Nikki is a strong leader, and she has what it takes to fight for what 's right -- both on the battlefield and in Congress.**
I'd love to have her with me on Capitol Hill, where we need more strong leaders to pass better laws and put principle above all else.
You and I both know that now more than ever we need effective, thoughtful, and practical leaders in office -- leaders who won't back down. [**Can you chip in to help make that happen?**](https://go.nikkifosteroh.%3D/?g=GWUUGFNw52hdu8VSCB5lAvA "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/nkf_monthly_april?refcode=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1&amount=25&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=&occupation=&employer=&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nikkifoster&utm_content=9+-+Can+you+chip+in+to+help+make+that+happen&utm_campaign=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1&source=NKF_EM_FR_200423_Moulton_U2_X1")

name: Matt Gaetz
subject: No Bailouts for Fake News
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MATT GAETZ
body:
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AMFCDyKAQTm2YNVPeBxj51QIUzIGS68GxGtN_0XJHK77pB_Xqs0vfMxhj8iZfLAUOSWpLOtO7oaEW9MplATyc-3XBjo26YeloedW8a5jm6o9pnq8sOHDqTpecS7z0S3wNqOw6_D6xl3eBAQBfFjo5U7OHhtEY-ZPA7RIbmmQ1PuttQaiSstpSdO55UpUoLhn&c=C20YTe4eO5ByM4BVizGK7lIgv5Ityg4yHjmmHnHz27ktnutUavQguA==&ch=N5SiJf-nTrrb1U-nij2SmbcIiW0h94NVAN1hg_bim1KfRp12JOLwng==)
---
| Patriot,
President Trump called out the mainstream fake news media, and the American people woke up and stopped watching. In editorial rooms throughout America, these media knuckleheads resent their viewers, readers, and listeners for supporting President Trump. Right now, they are pushing for bailout money, and WE cannot let them get away with this.
---
| | | [SAY NO TO A MAINSTREAM MEDIA BAILOUT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001AMFCDyKAQTm2YNVPeBxj51QIUzIGS68GxGtN_0XJHK77pB_Xqs0vfMxhj8iZfLAUOSWpLOtO7oaEW9MplATyc-3XBjo26YeloedW8a5jm6o9pnq8sOHDqTpecS7z0S3wNqOw6_D6xl3eBAQBfFjo5U7OHhtEY-ZPA7RIbmmQ1PuttQaiSstpSdO55UpUoLhn&c=C20YTe4eO5ByM4BVizGK7lIgv5Ityg4yHjmmHnHz27ktnutUavQguA==&ch=N5SiJf-nTrrb1U-nij2SmbcIiW0h94NVAN1hg_bim1KfRp12JOLwng==)
---
| I am doing everything I can to stop this from happening, but I need your help to make sure they don't receive a taxpayer-funded bailout. If the mainstream media goes under, so be it. These are tough times, and it shouldn't be up to the American people to keep them afloat.

name: Steph (Team Steel)
subject: Breaking point
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michelle Steel for Congress
body:
Without your help Nancy Pelosi will flood this district and we won't be able to catch up.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dUjqpXKdGBFXPi_7IzIKDWA3MOJPkc629OTKJdc30iCFd5soSAXAyHvTRZa09oRUzxcBJ45Z6xu6eWDFu-vwvL1zUEKeJcmGFQ1HmfchSegkwBRCuVexdyWLnNEsjSK1tYa1F794N2nZS3BiLvx37LlYIuH758siEeVfLMu-vH0O2hAu7_hybrQPxXua0l1Vxq0xyglIchtqNjujwlF17orA8fm9NP-jwUVKB5MggEU5IF_lwQtcvyToZD_x7qFvRv0B9gPaHA1T2-hrd77loMFo2q4RFn7oFhHoDF2SUSn5FWiXVguye3cuJT2SwM89OvYLD-3sVPkaqVX38JosckWxFLhB1GQXieic6-o5-AXl9bAn9PzIAw==&c=YlC1ZlM92WGdWLNDAXhXxFLYkIq9K3a4ougdVlTdWBLxXw0cbkYa5g==&ch=5E9R0T2smfSnO4_xXO5Xcd_aeguXno8Ii1UORNyMp3Y2qFNDcekRLA==)
Friend,

This is a top-targeted seat and a battleground in the fight for the House Majority. Michelle is the conservative fighter we need to take on Pelosi's handpicked candidate, but we need your help to keep us in the race:

[**Can you chip in $10 right now to send critical reinforcements to this must-flip district?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dUjqpXKdGBFXPi_7IzIKDWA3MOJPkc629OTKJdc30iCFd5soSAXAyK1TtqYdLs6uqCv2j-dVjiCG3pHnZy_78U7wEPsR_e-2jPbPeIb-6f0h8_0pHstQXm88I63BtKX0hkVw9rgI8nMQVrVF8P0LkE0fgWZr1lcMAaiGxEjdS4a-gMU3JJM9rZxdbgrYql9QqJqAiW8HCYJXJZn03TP79Wgx6_7D93EkdqWmZt3PTRjOZN6-AjkV2FFjBk7fVibcpeN5wb6eV3fwwxI1cndSiafQWOxgLqaq2ale_72lV3EqbozdQRwVUmScNlrbkzADySWXzcGvX9oidHZRoVXa8H9vve3chD2x6CGl6gVWu_WzdDDvYmc8kA==&c=YlC1ZlM92WGdWLNDAXhXxFLYkIq9K3a4ougdVlTdWBLxXw0cbkYa5g==&ch=5E9R0T2smfSnO4_xXO5Xcd_aeguXno8Ii1UORNyMp3Y2qFNDcekRLA==) Nancy Pelosi only recently flipped it blue in 2018, and this is our chance to take it back. Otherwise it'll be gone for good -- _along with our chance of reclaiming the House Majority._

As a first generation American, Michelle watched her single mother suffer at the hands of a broken political system that was taking advantage of those it was built to serve. Since then, she has made it her mission to provide hard-working Californians with common-sense, conservative reforms. She's returned $400 million to taxpayers in California and has taken a pledge to never raise or create new taxes. **Period**.

But Nancy Pelosi's campaign war chest and dark money machine has millions to spend against us and they're already organizing to do just that. Why? They know, just as well as we do, whoever wins this seat controls the House, and we have what it takes to win.

Friend, we are at the breaking point - [**We need 197 grassroots supporters to chip in $10 by midnight tonight to help us restore conservative leadership in Washington. name: Team Warner
subject: Re: tuna
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
If you were tickled by Mark's (lack of) cooking skills, we're offering this "Two Slice Man" sticker if you're able to chip in $5 or more to Mark's re-election campaign.
|
---
| | Derek --

We know. The tuna video took over the internet this week, with a little help from Sen. Harris. (If you don't know what we're talking about, **[check it out.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4f8/53d9897e/54c5c96d/1c886986/3535322646/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twosliceman?refcode=20200423_f_1_nd__552__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**) | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4f8/53d9897e/54c5c96d/1c886985/3535322646/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twosliceman?refcode=20200423_f_1_nd__552__&refcode2=graphic1&amount=5")
---
**[If you were tickled by Mark's (lack of) cooking skills, we're offering this "Two Slice Man" sticker if you're able to chip in $5 or more to his re-election campaign.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4f8/53d9897e/54c5c96d/1c886984/3535322646/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twosliceman?refcode=20200423_f_1_nd__552__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**
[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4f8/53d9897e/54c5c96d/1c886983/3535322646/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twosliceman?refcode=20200423_f_1_nd__552__&refcode2=graphic2&amount=5")
---
We hope this video brought you a moment of levity this week, but rest assured that Mark is still focused on ensuring that _**every**_ Virginian is supported and protected through this outbreak.

**Mark Warner does know that some meal preparation is best left to the professionals** -- and he's not letting his newfound cooking fame distract him from his mission.

He's leading the fight in the Senate to save paychecks and healthcare for millions of workers (including restaurant workers), but he's also facing a tough re-election fight. Whether you think the Mark Warner Tuna Melt is hilarious or gross (or both!), he needs your help to keep up this important work in the Senate.

**[>>> Chip in $5 or more now and we'll send you a limited-edition Mark Warner Two Slice Man sticker](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4f8/53d9897e/54c5c96d/1c886982/3535322646/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twosliceman?refcode=20200423_f_1_nd__552__&refcode2=ask3&amount=5")**

All of us on Team Warner mean it sincerely when we say we appreciate everything that our supporters do to help this campaign. Whether you share our content on social media, volunteer through our digital organizing program, or make a donation, you're what keeps us going. We know that this is a difficult time for many, and we appreciate you standing by us.

Thank you for your support,

Team Warner

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4f8/53d9897e/54c5c96d/1c886981/3535322646/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjU1MiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-twosliceman?refcode=20200423_f_1_nd__552__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")**
---

|
---

Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d4f8/53d9897e/54c5c96d/1c886980/3535322646/VEsB/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

subject: How we’re going to defeat Mitch McConnell
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
Starting today, there are only two months left until our primary. If we want to defeat Mitch McConnell on Election Day, we need to make sure we score a grassroots victory first in this primary.
#
Starting today, there are only _two months left_ until our primary.
**If we want a real Democrat with the same values & priorities as the people of Kentucky to represent us,** we need to make sure Charles is our candidate.
**If we don’t want to repeat the same mistakes as Democrats in the past who ran against Mitch,** we can’t pick another milquetoast, establishment candidate.
**If we want to defeat Mitch McConnell on Election Day,** we need to make sure we score a grassroots victory first in this primary.
**And if we want to make sure voters go out to support Charles,** we need to seriously increase our fundraising numbers so we can expand our grassroots voter outreach programs.
**[Will you chip in to our Defeat Mitch McConnell Fund? We’ll put down your name as one of the early supporters who helped launch this political movement.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17244451/187716800/1743945015?refcode=em20200423-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWY4MTQwZS1iYzg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uk3v2uevs7ON8goxWC2RqmkEDDeBu9LOiQWg8QaKrCU=)**

****[Contribute $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17244473/187716822/1743945015?refcode=em20200423-3&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWY4MTQwZS1iYzg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uk3v2uevs7ON8goxWC2RqmkEDDeBu9LOiQWg8QaKrCU=)****
Here’s the truth: We’re relying on grassroots donors like you to help us raise the funds we need to make this all possible.
We don’t get million dollar checks from our friends in the fossil fuel industry or have billionaire buddies who can help us out.
We’re a grassroots campaign that believes the only way we can truly put power into the hands of people is if we build a movement with people.
That means we count every dollar bill you give us. We treasure the spare change that folks are able to chip in.**When we put our $1, $5, $20.11 (our average online donation) contributions together — we can be more powerful than any billionaire or special interest check. **
**[With only 2 months left to go, we need more people helping out and giving $1, $5, and $20.11 donations. If you can afford to, will you chip in whatever you can to become a founding donor of the movement that will take down McConnell?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/17244475/187716824/1743945015?refcode=em20200423-3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODg4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZWY4MTQwZS1iYzg1LWVhMTEtYTk0Yy0wMDE1NWQwM2IxZTgiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uk3v2uevs7ON8goxWC2RqmkEDDeBu9LOiQWg8QaKrCU=)**
Together,
Team Booker

clean_body: Starting today, there are only two months left until our primary. If we want to defeat Mitch McConnell on Election Day, we need to make sure we score a grassroots victory first in this primary. Starting today, there are only two months left until our primary. If we want a real Democrat with the same values & priorities as the people of Kentucky to represent us, we need to make sure Charles is our candidate. If we don’t want to repeat the same mistakes as Democrats in the past who ran against Mitch, we can’t pick another milquetoast, establishment candidate. If we want to defeat Mitch McConnell on Election Day, we need to make sure we score a grassroots victory first in this primary. And if we want to make sure voters go out to support Charles, we need to seriously increase our fundraising numbers so we can expand our grassroots voter outreach programs. = = **= Here’s the truth: We’re relying on grassroots donors like you to help us raise the funds we need to make this all possible. We don’t get million dollar checks from our friends in the fossil fuel industry or have billionaire buddies who can help us out. We’re a grassroots campaign that believes the only way we can truly put power into the hands of people is if we build a movement with people. That means we count every dollar bill you give us. We treasure the spare change that folks are able to chip in.When we put our $1, $5, $20.11 (our average online donation) contributions together — we can be more powerful than any billionaire or special interest check. = Together, Team Booker =** | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: Sean Grier
subject: We can hardly believe it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
Take a look at everything we've accomplished together so far ->
|
---

| | I can hardly believe it -- our campaign has come a long way since Kathy announced back in December that she's running to represent North Carolina's 6th district:
1. EMILY's List endorsed our campaign.
2. We've reached our fundraising goals.
3. And Kathy won the primary election!

[_**Now, there 's only one week before the first end-of-month deadline of the quarter, and we need to keep up all of this great momentum to keep building a strong campaign that can win in November. If you can, please chip in a few dollars today. **_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d31d/3d199a51/2f76fda1/7364fcc8/2226488508/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQyMyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200423?refcode=kme200423_nd_m_other&refcode2=17426") _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | | [Donate $10](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d31d/3d199a51/2f76fda1/7364fcc8/2226488508/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQyMyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200423?refcode=kme200423_nd_m_other&refcode2=17426")

Of course, our campaign has changed a lot since Kathy announced her bid for Congress, too.
Before the current health crisis, our team was on the ground in the Triad in a big way. Kathy was doing meet-and-greets, voter forums, and community fundraisers, and we were knocking on doors all over the district to spread our message and connect with voters.
Now, we've had to postpone all events until further notice, and as a result, we're relying on strong online grassroots support more than ever before -- especially since Kathy isn't taking a dime from corporate PACs.
[_**It 's the only way we'll be able to bring home a victory for the Triad in November. So if you are able, please consider chipping in -- It makes a big difference to our campaign when you do.**_](https://secure.kathymanningfornc.com/page/m/18d9d31d/3d199a51/2f76fda1/7364fcc8/2226488508/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZEVDA1VEpTVT0iOiIxNzQyNiIsImUzdHpiSFZuZlgwPSI6ImttZTIwMDQyMyIsImUzdDJaWEp6YVc5dWZYMD0iOiJuZF9tIn0%3D/?g=Bm8FRTjfd5ld5gouxTH21cA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/kme200423?refcode=kme200423_nd_m_other&refcode2=17426")

Sean

body:
Chuck Schumer and his Far Left allies have been flooding the airwaves in Maine with smears that distort Susan's record. In the midst of a global pandemic, these lies are even more shocking. Whether it be Chuck Schumer's dark money group Majority Forward, or Sara Gideon's allies at Maine Momentum, the Far Left is spreading lie after lie to Mainers. We cannot allow these false attacks to go unanswered which is why we launched a new television ad setting the record straight.
To unsubscribe click [here](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=15&ms=NDIzNDEzOTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTMyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Peter,
Chuck Schumer and his Far Left allies have been flooding the airwaves in Maine with smears that distort Susan's record. In the midst of a global pandemic, these lies are even more shocking.
Whether it be Chuck Schumer's dark money group Majority Forward, or Sara Gideon's allies at Maine Momentum, the Far Left is spreading lie after lie to Mainers. We cannot allow these false attacks to go unanswered which is why we launched a new television ad setting the record straight.

[](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=14&ms=NDIzNDEzOTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTMyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
_**But here 's the thing:**_ The Far Left wants to make sure that as few Mainers as possible see this ad. They don't want Mainers to see the TRUTH. That is why it is so critical that this ad is seen on every television, computer, and cell phone of people across the state -- and [**we need to raise an additional $22,000 to make that happen.**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=NDIzNDEzOTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTMyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
We cannot allow Chuck Schumer's out of state donors continue to spread lies without hearing the truth about Susan!
[**Can you chip in $5, $10, $25 or even $50 to help fund our ad and help spread the truth?**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=19&ms=NDIzNDEzOTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTMyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
Our campaign is powered by grassroots supporters like you who care deeply about the future of our country. We don't have Chuck Schumer's endless Far Left money to rely on. If we do not raise $22,000, the Far Left's ads will go unanswered. [**We are counting on you to make whatever donation you can afford!**](http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIzNDEzOTIS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTMyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)
-Team Collins
P.S. Every dollar you donate to Susan's campaign is not taken for granted. Susan sees every donation and is immensely grateful for all your incredible support!

name: Gina Raimondo
subject: An announcement about the rest of the 2019-2020 school year
body:
Your daily Rhode Island COVID-19 update
---
| | | | | |
---
Hello friend,
Distance learning is incredibly difficult. But here in Rhode Island, we're making it work--and we're doing it better than most other states. Statewide, we've seen more than 90% participation almost every single day of distance learning. Teachers, students, families, principals, superintendents and staff all deserve incredible praise for their efforts. This would not have been possible without their creativity, passion, dedication, and determination.
Today I want to let you all know that we've made the difficult--but necessary--decision to continue distance learning for the remainder of this school year. I've spoken over the past few weeks with superintendents, mayors, principals, teachers - and this is their consensus recommendation.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vw4sMNO1KsKMWbU7DfsooA1unULks6fdPXsRQ4pkvGNRV62t_HoJcZl7VbIU_LMxO_bGW1w1j1ypTqptoeEcCXoJuDtP_gTlpSfeAi49PiGs-PK6mawuaaE45OWkF53jTErXXFvAzphxfkFdjjzjmGSA1Hrzs2wqtxtEKSR5EffKzT6w4yJ4ovenEfA9M0o9LGF2vYvQte4=&c=h0z6NxzezgsAK21jI5qS5ZbgNBDuErU-Ueo0itsjaIWoyjDL_SEPGw==&ch=67NZFrqCmaZrJ5vTEHxQlKAI8KBhMj9VJndAON1ttFCFh9QMS330RQ==)
---
| To stay up to date with Rhode Island's latest COVID-19 statistics, please check the Department of Health's [new data dashboard](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vw4sMNO1KsKMWbU7DfsooA1unULks6fdPXsRQ4pkvGNRV62t_HoJcZl7VbIU_LMxO_bGW1w1j1ypTqptoeEcCXoJuDtP_gTlpSfeAi49PiGs-PK6mawuaaE45OWkF53jTErXXFvAzphxfkFdjjzjmGSA1Hrzs2wqtxtEKSR5EffKzT6w4yJ4ovenEfA9M0o9LGF2vYvQte4=&c=h0z6NxzezgsAK21jI5qS5ZbgNBDuErU-Ueo0itsjaIWoyjDL_SEPGw==&ch=67NZFrqCmaZrJ5vTEHxQlKAI8KBhMj9VJndAON1ttFCFh9QMS330RQ==) for all the information you need about the spread of coronavirus in Rhode Island.
---
| The reality is, we do not have enough data or evidence to inform a safe reopening of our school buildings. Doing so without the right health and safety measures is a risk I'm not willing to take. It's more important that we spend this time working to develop strong summer programs and the right strategies to re-open schools safely in September.
Like April, RIDE will issue a statewide calendar for May and June. This will allow us to ensure that every teacher has some time for lesson planning and professional development. We are not giving up on this last month and a half of learning.
For parents who need guidance on how to support their kids with distance learning, I am proud to announce that RIDE, working with the Highlander Institute, has expanded their distance learning helpline to support parents and families. Parents can access this service by calling the Helpline at 909-414-4927 or going online at [highlanderinstitute.org](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vw4sMNO1KsKMWbU7DfsooA1unULks6fdPXsRQ4pkvGNRV62t_HoJcW9hD-0RSSfW32OyC3r4VPusstZi8HvPDAHpAa9BHBR_jEXbYnZqZdS_t6NmvUhg1yXkok7gZMxtwULJyd6c1dABJe_h1Y7RYV9atfXjf86P&c=h0z6NxzezgsAK21jI5qS5ZbgNBDuErU-Ueo0itsjaIWoyjDL_SEPGw==&ch=67NZFrqCmaZrJ5vTEHxQlKAI8KBhMj9VJndAON1ttFCFh9QMS330RQ==).
I also want to remind everyone, particularly parents, about Kids Link. Kids Link is a 24/7 hotline that parents can call when their child is feeling excessive anger or sadness, lashing out at siblings, friends, and adults, having severe worries, or hurting himself/herself or others. The number is 1-855-543-5465.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vw4sMNO1KsKMWbU7DfsooA1unULks6fdPXsRQ4pkvGNRV62t_HoJcW9hD-0RSSfWffI-TmNOU4iujBYQBBk08HLIIF1MqEuNI2jFQ16oH41yilSJFM1byLjEvixBxFuTjNfG5il3boNcC8e-k41Nh-QTlsQ4ETmc2lPRH5Gmw10LLMSf5BtJpAR9tRWhPFnh3U0bemPAnl0=&c=h0z6NxzezgsAK21jI5qS5ZbgNBDuErU-Ueo0itsjaIWoyjDL_SEPGw==&ch=67NZFrqCmaZrJ5vTEHxQlKAI8KBhMj9VJndAON1ttFCFh9QMS330RQ==)
---
| Our students will understandably have a lot of questions about the decision to extend distance learning--and this crisis more broadly. Next Thursday, April 30th, at 1 p.m., I will hold another Kids' Press Conference to respond directly to our kids. Last time, we received more than 15,000 questions! I'll answer some of those as well as new ones that students can submit online through [this form](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vw4sMNO1KsKMWbU7DfsooA1unULks6fdPXsRQ4pkvGNRV62t_HoJcW9hD-0RSSfWiz6b7KYCeurVsrUmE_hDEF3332O0jGRxGzm5r5MGD0cAZe00iMAiG4TMr3HniKPIJfegZv6BgAQSs2uRSAIRSYOifuT-K2nBFMgWDyyPEWlkhNvJ5LzMA1gDrQThtxL8msjc24mz9v328-XtH9_OVZTqeUilj9EUyFZuAkP-E90k7SdU7dJcloZhMvxB8EzN&c=h0z6NxzezgsAK21jI5qS5ZbgNBDuErU-Ueo0itsjaIWoyjDL_SEPGw==&ch=67NZFrqCmaZrJ5vTEHxQlKAI8KBhMj9VJndAON1ttFCFh9QMS330RQ==).
To our families, let me be clear: this is not a 'see you in September.' When distance learning ends, we will have summer offerings available for students. These will probably look different from the traditional summer camps and other experiences our kids are used to - but we will not leave you with nothing. I'll have more to say in the coming weeks about the re-opening of childcare and plans for the summer.
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19, If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001vw4sMNO1KsKMWbU7DfsooA1unULks6fdPXsRQ4pkvGNRV62t_HoJcW9hD-0RSSfWy0ZLNsIJc5xjsbXtmTlg9grLOrtmX-GlMPV03kioOYfMEhbvdIHaTH9asofTfSmnGq7QlPxH7qrtCVhZgGltoza5nlYIh7Yn5z1OUOxP3csFROCeI5pJZQgJOxBEQ4Nm6iTvqhMOXMLELt4y0E1tEpTxpV0Z0c5EAu9c7dMsEFzo_jfQxdnLtQyvIi7SGGcidrnN110lC3MAH3dOthXLNpQw4RuyRA6VEp8L_fPzcVSxr_H-4m6PFtnjM8JRDNeUe0Qkq456_gM=&c=h0z6NxzezgsAK21jI5qS5ZbgNBDuErU-Ueo0itsjaIWoyjDL_SEPGw==&ch=67NZFrqCmaZrJ5vTEHxQlKAI8KBhMj9VJndAON1ttFCFh9QMS330RQ==).

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Biden is WEAK on China
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate 2226 Cottondale Lane
body:
Standing up to China is the most important national security issue of our time. And the Democrats' nominee for President -- Sleepy Joe Biden -- is soft on China. Joe thinks that China is not a threat and not even competition to us. Joe helped China get bad trade deals which led to millions of lost jobs in the United States.Click here to unsubscribe http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/servlet/OneClickOptOutServlet?m=42341428&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTcyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0 Peter,

Over the past few months, we've seen the damage that China has inflicted on the world.

The Chinese Communist Party is responsible for every job loss and every death from the China virus.

Standing up to China is the most important national security issue of our time.

And the Democrats' nominee for President -- Sleepy Joe Biden -- is soft on China.

Joe thinks that China is not a threat and not even competition for us. Joe helped China get bad trade deals which led to China stealing millions of jobs from the United States. And after President Trump listened to me and agreed to ban travel from China, Joe called him xenophobic.

That's why I've made an ad that shows how weak Joe Biden is on China. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=20&ms=NDIzNDE0MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTcyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0 http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=NDIzNDE0MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTcyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0 PLAY http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=12&ms=NDIzNDE0MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTcyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0 Will you watch this ad, share it with your friends, and donate to help me air this widely? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=13&ms=NDIzNDE0MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTcyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0

We've already run it on TV in swing states, but I want to do more.

And I will be able to with your help. Every voter needs to know the truth!

Can you make a donation of $5, $10, $25 or even $50 to ensure this ad is seen by as many voters as possible before November? http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=22&ms=NDIzNDE0MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTcyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0

Please, watch this ad, and help me get this on the air. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDIzNDE0MjgS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUwOTcyMwS2&mt=1&rt=0

In service,

Are you getting updates from the campaign?

I’m reaching out to you today to give you the three easy steps to make sure our messages for you are being properly received every time.

If you would prefer not to receive future emails, visit here. http://links.mail1.digitalcampaignstrategies.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=NDIzNDE1MDQS1&r=ODQ4NzI0NzcxNjgxS0&b=0&j=MTc0MjUxMDQzOQS2&mt=1&rt=0

Peter,

Have you been receiving my team’s emails?

My team has heard that some of our supporters are not receiving our emails. Nancy Pelosi has officially listed this congressional seat as a top target for the far Left this Fall. This being the case, we absolutely can’t afford to have our top supporters miss critical campaign updates!

I’m reaching out to you today to give you the three easy steps to make sure our messages for you are being properly received every time.

To make sure you don’t miss out on a single message that my team or I send you from the campaign trail, follow these simple steps below to always receive our messages.

Thank you for your continued support of our campaign!

Mike Turner

name: Team Christy
subject: This is our biggest goal yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Christy Smith for Congress
body:
| []()
---

| | Peter --

Voting closes in less than 3 weeks. It's hard to believe how quickly this election has come upon us.

Now that ballots have been sent out to people in the district, the outcome of this election lays in their hands -- but there is still a lot we can do to show why Christy is the best candidate in the race.

We have a new digital ad we want to get online in 3 days -- but to have as wide a reach as possible, we need to raise $100,000 over the next 3 days (our biggest goal yet).

**[So, if you can, please make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can RIGHT NOW so we can crush this fundraising goal and get our ad online.](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb6b/29776869/a2343b0/569f57dd/2783482118/VEsH/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjNfMTAwazNkYXlzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200423_100k3days-full")** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [Express Donate $5](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb6b/29776869/a2343b0/569f57de/2783482118/VEsE/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjNfMTAwazNkYXlzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200423_100k3days-full&express_lane=true&amount=5") | [Express Donate $25](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb6b/29776869/a2343b0/569f57df/2783482118/VEsF/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjNfMTAwazNkYXlzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200423_100k3days-full&express_lane=true&amount=25")
---|---
[Express Donate $50](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb6b/29776869/a2343b0/569f57d8/2783482118/VEsC/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjNfMTAwazNkYXlzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200423_100k3days-full&express_lane=true&amount=50") | [Express Donate $100](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb6b/29776869/a2343b0/569f57d9/2783482118/VEsD/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjNfMTAwazNkYXlzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200423_100k3days-full&express_lane=true&amount=100")
[Express Donate $250](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb6b/29776869/a2343b0/569f57da/2783482118/VEsA/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjNfMTAwazNkYXlzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200423_100k3days-full&express_lane=true&amount=250") | [Donate Other Amount](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb6b/29776869/a2343b0/569f57dd/2783482118/VEsB/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjNfMTAwazNkYXlzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200423_100k3days-full")
Mike Garcia's campaign is benefiting from a flood of outside spending from Republican special interest groups. These groups are clamoring to flip a congressional seat in California from blue to red -- but we won't let them.

The truth is, Peter, there are a lot of people watching this race closely. Given the unusual circumstances surrounding us, including that this election is taking place almost entirely by mail-in ballot, onlookers are looking to our race as a bellwether for November.

And now that Donald Trump has gotten involved, the stakes are even higher.

Let's show the country the type of leadership people are looking for -- commonsense, kind-hearted, and solution-oriented representatives who will fight for every person and make sure we are all safe during this time.

**[Help us prove to everyone (especially the Republican special interest groups) that Christy is the leader we need during this time -- chip in whatever you can today to help meet our fundraising goal!](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb6b/29776869/a2343b0/569f57dd/2783482118/VEsO/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjNfMTAwazNkYXlzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200423_100k3days-full")**

Thanks for stepping up during this difficult time. Everyone, especially Christy, appreciates it so much.

\-- Team Christy
[DONATE](https://secure.christyforcongress.org/page/m/14f6bb6b/29776869/a2343b0/569f57dd/2783482118/VEsP/p/eyJlM3R5WldaamIyUmxmWDA9IjoiZW0yMF8yMDA0MjNfMTAwazNkYXlzLWZ1bGwifQ%3D%3D/?g=TRA5GMQot1BeTNifStrWt_A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2004_email_christysmith?refcode=em20_200423_100k3days-full")

name: Holcomb Crew
subject: New data providing a head-start
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
Yesterday, President Donald Trump told the nation what we already know here in Indiana – Indiana is making some phenomenal progress in our fight | | [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=661d41075a294b1d8e85ce34e473ec12&_e=xpj-wlJEBhLENBcKE05bpLOYrG9_qjqBPzHqxcMCd7i1oMHrs3UBDNqALafO30y-1y-IiOrXONKb3owVsQL-orcFHa5oVaqEjXWfvLSMCInJcEyxSz3WC1vNBHvh-psshr5KTb79l4Ei4D_kJLbl4QPpbegTNisueBrdIZr6bcU-BOjmo-Hrqm3EFhNiBXz0YsMlsRwKkdKWl_1589nwjOlXtCog_WmZ9-nw7DNPOgttOJYEjhxE-Soee3Cvy0nSOsL6V2nG5ZHT3-cHu5Dc_PQ5kKKU1YaHEZKyYZqcEdlSB2SI7GmHh1BQLiNhGvJ5qI65R82dsPcUwxcLJ9iYhNnjFb_4zE7RpDFpzSxw4zpextchb7eJF6Td5riqJtvrfqByeDHTiifDy4Bq8npUmw4swg0qXI7F4scXy12Q97ODTPRWUUUpekfQxpFvMH8I) |
---|---|---
Friend,

Yesterday, President Donald Trump told the nation what we already know here in Indiana – Indiana is making some phenomenal progress in our fight against COVID-19.

**_“...some (states) are doing phenomenally well. Indiana, I looked at their numbers...it’s incredible what they’re doing.”_**
**-President Donald Trump**

And today, Governor Holcomb announced that Indiana is leading the way through a new partnership with the Fairbanks School of Public Health for a _**multi-phased, scientifically-valid, statewide**_ study.

_**This study will examine the true prevalence of Hoosiers who have been infected with COVID-19 and now have antibodies.**_ Complementing existing clinical testing, a random sample of Hoosiers – representative of our entire state by demographics and region – have already started to receive invitations to participate in this study. The first phase of this study will start on Saturday, and preliminary results will be available in just a few days.

What makes this data different than current testing? This study is a random sample of Hoosiers, _**and isn’t focused on just symptomatic Hoosiers – it’s looking at our entire population**_ and how we’re doing as an entire state, including those of us who have had mild symptoms or no symptoms at all.
[ ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=661d41075a294b1d8e85ce34e473ec12&_e=xpj-wlJEBhLENBcKE05bpLOYrG9_qjqBPzHqxcMCd7i1oMHrs3UBDNqALafO30y-1y-IiOrXONKb3owVsQL-orcFHa5oVaqEjXWfvLSMCInJcEyxSz3WC1vNBHvh-psshr5KTb79l4Ei4D_kJLbl4QPpbegTNisueBrdIZr6bcU-BOjmo-Hrqm3EFhNiBXz0YsMlsRwKkdKWl_1589nwjOR0A4o-l2UmCa85KiDT5OnUgGVX1QJ9Fr4AuqTBDiVTB-SuYj_1-SGdSRmoBGN07ZXhkepVDMAxskaXuvW0opcg2Q6uDbMeyV-xq1Cmbi-9zKkRtb8bi8TPb2vp7sBHOuwev9-Ihm8OHjCNZdYAvXfsb1GoPUtKt-9U6lHELMWlSUPhVB524jeboVSPKLGm3FXk6V8uxVYAmRoEMHXPzimUAWkFOfhPCCYJu1A8kc2t)
[ **WATCH: Learn About Indiana's New COVID-19 Statewide Study** ](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=661d41075a294b1d8e85ce34e473ec12&_e=xpj-wlJEBhLENBcKE05bpLOYrG9_qjqBPzHqxcMCd7i1oMHrs3UBDNqALafO30y-1y-IiOrXONKb3owVsQL-orcFHa5oVaqEjXWfvLSMCInJcEyxSz3WC1vNBHvh-psshr5KTb79l4Ei4D_kJLbl4QPpbegTNisueBrdIZr6bcU-BOjmo-Hrqm3EFhNiBXz0YsMlsRwKkdKWl_1589nwjNM7PCeqzzdBaOIGs-UEHIo_jcH7jx3411Al_puaWkXt3ChEuQzN8lF1lWiujyI3Gvz5ltCuWPDMoan5UCokuSyMDH5np9ET1FaSAi54oQYKyFOrmjKre8d8cWkLMZg77Vl7Jn0U0HaSYrdq6YjDEG8ujF8c-hBYYQsE0vp4g0Hn2tMKYgFtblA2CTCcfeYezmTMBRHG5e8SxDlXz7Ew7bWqAj5u1VK-m0EmgCH6J54P)
_**Indiana is one of the first states to conduct a study like this, which gives us a head-start as we continue to make data-driven decisions in our response to this pandemic.**_

With a clearer data-driven view of this virus’ spread, we’ll gain an even greater community-level understanding of this virus, _**allowing Governor Holcomb and our local leaders to continue to act swiftly to keep Hoosiers safe and healthy.**_

If you’re one of the thousands of Hoosiers who is randomly selected to participate in this study (in this first phase or a future phase) – please participate, and together, we’ll see the light at the end of this tunnel soon.

#INThisTogether,
-Your Holcomb Crew
---
---
|
|
| |
---

| Eric Holcomb for Indiana, 101 W Ohio Street, Suite 2200, Indianapolis, IN 46204 | (317) 569-0709 |
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com

|
| [Unsubscribe](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_s=661d41075a294b1d8e85ce34e473ec12&_t=A_SZ7NpuOxSPTj9a4wmeKJy4UppWViM_8dJfndlLV9rseZVPC39U5FfYNhwPB8hEzcFlGhzOTQwUVBvdXrJi4zqhJw73qCSzIeA8-_HkLNlkS1z4sU-0e9cVO9xz1U4P-9Crm-c4T7CHhFMLQNObbf8YeWLToMaGckIbO-lnTLk%3D) |

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Who we’re fighting for
body:
America’s 30 million small businesses employ nearly half of our nation’s private-sector workforce. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e9b69df013&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • April 23, 2020
---
| | |
# **Who we’re fighting for**

**America’s 30 million** small businesses employ nearly half of our nation’s private-sector workforce. As Americans stay home to slow the spread of Coronavirus, many of these small companies have been forced to temporarily shut down or cut back on work.

**Within the next 24 hours,** President Trump will be sending more help their way.

**After unnecessary delay** from Speaker Nancy Pelosi and House Democrats, Congress is finally replenishing President Trump’s Paycheck Protection Program (PPP). Operated by the Small Business Administration, the PPP ensures that employers can continue to pay workers and cover costs during the global Coronavirus outbreak.

**The program** proved essential for small businesses—so popular, in fact, that it ran through its funds in just 14 days. After pressure from President Trump, Congress reached a deal with the Administration to provide an additional $310 billion for the program, along with $75 billion for hospitals and $25 billion for testing.

**More relief** for America’s small businesses can’t wait a moment longer. As story after story shows, these forgivable loans are the difference between survival and layoffs in communities across our country:
* [**“I have customers call me in tears,”**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5edd8aeb74&e=3ee4985eea) one Utah community banker says.

* [**A fifth-generation family business**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ff5e26cf49&e=3ee4985eea) in Pennsylvania can now survive and protect the jobs of its 35 workers.

* [**One Florida community bank**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=b7e17935b4&e=3ee4985eea) went above and beyond to rescue a small company in need.

* [**A Minnesota construction owner**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=cea2e90caf&e=3ee4985eea) says this aid “helps with the cash flow.”

* [**A Michigan bagel shop**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=080f3f2465&e=3ee4985eea) that survived the Great Depression and World War II was in trouble—but now can afford to keep its employees on payroll.

**That’s just a snapshot** of why this support matters.

**Small businesses** power the American economy. The Paycheck Protection Program should never have run out of money—President Trump asked Congress to refill it 16 days ago, before funds dried up. There was no excuse for Democrats to stall for more partisan pork while American families wondered when their next paycheck would come.

**To the****workers** and small businesses who need this relief, President Trump is fighting for you. Tomorrow, his signature will right the wrongs of politicians who once again put their needs before your own.

**🎬****President Trump:** [Thanks to you, America will be ready to safely reopen soon](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4d70f71c14&e=3ee4985eea)

---
|
---
|
## **🌲****WATCH: President and First Lady plant tree for Earth Day**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a251f0a0d5&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **In honor** of Earth Day, and tomorrow’s Arbor Day, President Trump helped plant a new maple tree on the White House grounds yesterday. He was joined by First Lady Melania Trump, Vice President Mike Pence, and Second Lady Karen Pence.

**“On this special occasion,** we are renewing our strong national commitment on conserving the wonder of God’s creation,” President Trump said. This year, “we celebrate that America leads the world in environmental stewardship,” he added.

🎬 [In this tough time, nature’s beauty is a symbol of hope](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=74baab113f&e=3ee4985eea)

**Earlier this year** in Switzerland, President Trump committed to a new campaign—the [One Trillion Tree Initiative](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=572e8927a2&e=3ee4985eea)—to promote conservation efforts globally.

**“As our nation** grows stronger and greater in the months and years to come,” the President said yesterday, “this tree will grow also, and it will stand tall and beautiful.”

[Read President Trump’s message on the 50th anniversary of Earth Day.](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d9cc14b182&e=3ee4985eea)

**📸****Photos:** [First Lady helps plant maple tree on South Lawn](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=417ac0be42&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
|
## Photo of the Day
---
|
---
| **Vice President Pence addresses employees over the intercom at GE Healthcare in Madison, WI** | April 21, 2020
---
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=4bf69ab6e3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=5d8a20da78&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=6aca2ae92d)
---

name: Wesley Hunt
subject: We Need To Take Back The House
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

When I was in the Army, I learned that you see the consequences of bad
leadership in the most difficult times.

Well Friend, we've seen the consequences over the past month of Nancy Pelosi
and Democrats controlling the House. In the past 4 weeks, we have seen 2
perfect examples of how Pelosi's policies are harmful to us right here in
Houston.

Refusal to Fund the Strategic Petroleum Reserve

In March, President Trump and both Republican and Democratic Congressional
leaders had an agreement to relieve our struggling economy. Part of that
agreement included purchasing 75 million gallons of oil for the Strategic
Petroleum Reserve. That was the agreement, until Nancy Pelosi returned from a
trip to California and killed the deal. Speaker Pelosi then delayed the bill
for days to include funding for some of her Green New Deal pet projects and
stripped away the funding for the Strategic Petroleum Reserve.

That purchase would have helped with the storage issues that are partially
responsible for Monday's crash. That funding would have helped protect jobs
right here in Houston and around the country. But Nancy Pelosi’s priorities
don’t include helping Texas or this district and, without a champion, we lost
that funding.

Delaying the Payment Protection Program

The Coronavirus pandemic has put a crunch on our small businesses here in
Houston. Businesses ranging from laundromats to retailers to restaurants are in
danger of closing down for good. If we don't provide these businesses with the
support they need, Houston will change forever.

But when Republicans asked to provide an additional $250 billion in relief to
allow these businesses to remain open and keep their employees on staff, Nancy
Pelosi refused. She and her caucus delayed and delayed, wasting the time these
business owners don't have. This decision cost business owners resources when
they were at their most vulnerable, denying them the funding they needed to
continue employing our citizens.

To me, that’s not leadership.

These are the consequences of Nancy Pelosi being elected Speaker of the
House. And my opponent, Congresswoman Lizzie Fletcher, was one of those who put
her in that position.

Without a leader standing up for this district, our priorities will continue
to be put at the back of the line, behind those of Pelosi and the other
liberals in the House.

That is why our mission is so important. I hope you'll join us in our
campaign to bring real leadership back to the 7th District.

Sincerely,
Wesley Hunt

Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply
endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to unsubscribe
<http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=85f55a38e2434ff09fc9238ac21478ce&_t=KAKdZ9ncCFBRDlKLdzD4Cxvwx3X6NlXMy4q2oKEXD-SEi823qpkNZz81075F0C9VgjBhRlOCeR2fNYXjycmkaRwiYy6XrYpQdNr8lN48loFMMbVstmL4Ei2MtKMCrwPoKOkU963K8R4KDkU4zKV3b0GN9EJXqnlOjOCKKCYOMHc%3D>
.

| | Tonight we have a really special broadcast and wanted to make sure you are able to tune in! Joe will be having a conversation with the cast and composers of the Tony Award-winning musical Dear Evan Hansen! They'll be talking through key themes of the show - such as how to cope with social isolation and quarantine while struggling with mental health. There will also be TWO musical performances by Jordan Fisher and Gabrielle Carrubba. **Make sure you tune in at 8 p.m. ET!** This broadcast will be streamed live across [**Facebook**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390190/55b66746/205ce3f9/80e6317/2689229534/VEsE/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.facebook.com/JoeKennedyIII"), [**Twitter**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390190/55b66746/205ce3f9/80e6310/2689229534/VEsF/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://twitter.com/joekennedy"), and [**YouTube**](https://secure.kennedyforma.com/page/m/36390190/55b66746/205ce3f9/80e6311/2689229534/VEsC/?g=wJ6aEDjfd5ldgcs4t9rIVg "https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC7oDDRXYM0zoDQO7HAxvlBg"). name: Jerid
subject: re: Stacey Abrams' note for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
We might be outspent, but we'll never be outworked.
This is huge, friend: **Stacey Abrams has officially endorsed Reverend Warnock (D) for U.S. Senate in Georgia!**
Stacey knows that if we want to flip Georgia blue and restore moral leadership to our government, we need Reverend Warnock leading the way. That's why she's all in to help us win this critical battleground race.
Election experts like Nate Silver's FiveThirtyEight say Democrats can take back the Senate, but we have to win in Georgia. But our opponent - Kelly Loeffler (R) - has pledged to spend $20 million of her own fortune to try and buy this seat - and right now, this race is neck and neck.
We might be outspent, but we'll never be outworked. We need to raise another $3,292 from grassroots supporters before midnight to keep up this fight and win this race. **Friend, we 're counting on you: Will you please join Stacey by pitching in $5 or more now, so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats?**
Here's the best link: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/page/warnock-for-georgia_email](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e732/288179be/a7c4323/348e8965/4053845174/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk168-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Let's win this thing,
Jerid Kurtz
Campaign Manager
Warnock for Georgia
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Stacey Abrams
Date: Wed, April 22, 2020
Subject: I need you, friend
Friend,
In a moment, I'm going to ask you to make a donation to Reverend Raphael Warnock's campaign for U.S. Senate in Georgia. **But first, let me explain why I am proud to endorse him and why your support is so critical.**
In 2018, we built a diverse coalition of hardworking folks from all over Georgia, especially Georgians from marginalized communities who felt unseen and unheard. Our fight was rooted in the belief that poverty is immoral, that Georgians deserve access to affordable health care and that the economy ought to work for everyone.
The fact is, people in the White House and the U.S. Senate are failing Georgians of every political party, every race and every region.
The Republican Party's divisive agenda - and systematic voter suppression - goes against everything we stand for as Americans. But here's what gives me hope: All around the country, good people - including many folks who have never been involved with politics before - are stepping up to fight back and defend American values. We have the grassroots energy we need to restore this nation's democracy - and if we all do our part in 2020 to elect leaders who share these values, I know we can make our vision for the country a reality.
That's why I am so excited Reverend Raphael Warnock, a champion for Georgians in the fight for justice, announced he is running for U.S. Senate. Reverend Warnock is a strong leader, a pastor and an advocate - and he would be the first black senator our state has ever elected. **[If you are as ready as I am to support Reverend Warnock's campaign, please give $5 or more right now so we can flip Georgia blue and take back the Senate for Democrats in 2020.](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e732/288179be/a7c4323/348e8965/4053845174/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk168-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Reverend Warnock knows the incredible movement we built in Georgia in 2018, and he's determined to build the energy we need all the way to the ballot box in November. He's ready to fight voter suppression, ensure that health care is protected and expanded and break barriers to opportunity so that future generations know that the sky is the limit.
For the past 15 years, I have watched Reverend Warnock lead on issues of social justice, economic access and voting rights. We stood shoulder to shoulder on the toughest fights, against opponents who used their power to belittle and erase their fellow Georgians. He's dedicated his life to public service, and I know _without a doubt_ that he will be a strong advocate for folks in every corner of our state.
**But if we are going to build momentum and flip Georgia blue in 2020, we need to show Reverend Warnock - and a Republican Party that thinks they can steal this seat by spending millions of dollars and suppressing the vote - that we have a grassroots movement strong enough to win. That is why I need supporters like YOU to help us get this campaign off the ground. **
**[So please, friend, will you give $5 now- as much as you can spare - to help Reverend Warnock win this Senate seat, flip Georgia blue and ensure our constitutional rights are protected in the years to come? ](https://secure.warnockforgeorgia.com/page/m/60b3e732/288179be/a7c4323/348e8965/4053845174/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5Ijoid2Fybm9jay1mb3ItZ2VvcmdpYV9lbWFpbCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoianRrMTY4LWZyLW5kIiwiZTNzZ1RGQkJRVkYxWlhKNVUzUnlhVzVuSUgxOSI6IjUsMjUsNTAsMTAwLDI1MCw1MDAiLCJlM3NnWVdKeVpXTjFjbkpwYm1jZ2ZYMD0iOiIifQ%3D%3D/?g=3wiJLcQot1BeM8zu13FVD5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warnock-for-georgia_email?refcode=jtk168-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")**
Thank you for your support.
Stacey Abrams

Dear supporters, **Welcome to the final four weeks of our campaign!** Voter pamphlets have hit mailboxes. The deadline to register to vote is in FIVE DAYS. And we are doing everything we can to hit the phones harder than ever to win this race on May 19. If you were thinking..."yeah I'll get out and knock doors when it's time to vote," NOW is that time. We need you to volunteer from home today, and every day you can until May 19. We have three shifts a day, at 12, 3, and 5. Many people getting involved for the first time, all are welcome. You can make calls from your couch, and you will really make _the_ difference for this race. If you can't make calls, [make a contribution](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.316/yOAnnoOyQd2HT9tlvEUfEw/h2/hhRpZZW1RfrqdNP9De00vQRlUIk-2BKhU3wA9r6CKglNJfvvN8qBuq7ZECa2iJJ-2FwvdXh4D9A9ffiDChmxtXvoHD0aTsblSl6UtECdEJcf-2FtAc4yRvc-2BCQDopt88MQu9Gl0-2FFZ8b-2B4cjjMBlbOqbgZdbf2atph0eOapWdIhGsm9soMAdOO7A6VxHpGjJwi8R9z6ug7xDVY8ZYChTcM-2BQHlbFG03niHXimDxoC57hwcilcuCeDZBrxm583tIb8JMUxxrd9sx1Z15e3cp3kLSgvjedQwV2U2AMbMq9t3dJ-2BPntmC-2FAqRy2s2plyMzOifOb1P5MtUh013zeCkvlPD9edyJZ3NQn8u2wZv-2FAEHLsFEGiM-3D/zCGA). We are spending money fast on yard signs, texting, power dialier software, digital ads and more. We need your support now or we won't hit our goals. The urgency of change in our country is at a fever pitch, with the COVID 19 crisis continuing to spiral, and Democratic leadership Congress continuing to hold back from fighting for the solutions we need right now: healthcare for all, rent and mortgage relief, and monthly emergency basic income to keep our families afloat. Incumbency in Congress only helps us if the incumbent is fighting for us. We need new leadership that is unbought and unafraid to take a stand, and that's who I am and why I'm running.
Thank you for your support and being part of this movement. Onward, Doyle

Peter) DeFazio isn't the sort of representative who will make seismic changes in Washington, and he won't take flashy stands on issues important to many Oregonians." **Excuse me, what?** There has never been a time in which seismic shifts were more important than the one that we are in right now. As the coronavirus puts tens of millions of Americans out of work and all that our establishment politicians can think to do is bail out their corporate donors (looking at you, Boeing), we need progressive leaders like Doyle Canning in office more than ever.** ****The Register-Guard 's half-hearted endorsement of DeFazio as a defender of the status quo reads to my generation as a full-throated endorsement of his opponent.** It is time to take a stand against corporate corruption and insider politics. It is time to take a stand to fight for working people in our district and our nation. It is time to take a stand with Doyle Canning." - **Madeline Cowen, Eugene**
---
[**Register Guard**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.316/yOAnnoOyQd2HT9tlvEUfEw/h7/9Keqjt2rNZ2OQD7Ygf3GCNJ17KhjkUCVUNxILqlweBXtBQpGJiuvrRXcbBX2kaRsBE9DLxwzCTwEGuYLE-2B4wNqja-2Fu3X2vIU4vVn2m-2BtILq2w7PGSX8aCbEl0eAO2-2FgcnR8kiEaMNqzBMJqcVGAxb4SS8jUB0Qksm5veDIGbI-2B9TwvhRr6z2BPe9dhboHhtpY4do3wysl1Kwqb51YZrcjm7gBeCc5QkcpeASVoUdf9NnDDWsRJX9l0Dh2GcP8MhySvf6oD30wUgV9CIJcnEsgoWZLiRyDbiGGUzR1CiHM6LGMNqg-2F63D4zldYEQCED00-2Fy8VIv-2BYKHjOlvtfwYNjfA5XKlMbaRSV6grF9xWIEiI69WmIMTyJVRXiFvP6kw63688mCZh3rIlfmayDgNjVGQ-3D-3D/zLHk) _**The Planet will Vote Them Out**_ "In response to the Register-Guard's "Our View" piece in faithful deference to Peter DeFazio, we say this: The exact time for a change in leadership is now! We have less than nine years to change the course we are on or we will live through a human-made crisis that makes the COVID-19 pandemic look like a rehearsal. Consider that it is the "seniority" and "institutional knowledge" of our elected Congress that has done nothing to stop the climate crisis we face. The minds that allowed the problem to accelerate are not the minds with the ability and courage to correct it. This responsibility falls on the younger generations that will live through the mid-21st century when the peak of collapse is due. It's time for the over-65 representatives to get out of the way so energetic youth, like Doyle Canning, can get on with a Green New Deal, clean energy, restore our farm and forest land and educate future generations how to create a balance between humans and planet. Either we choose new leadership in 2020, or the planet will choose our future leaders from the humble citizens who survive the collapse. - **Deb McGee and Linda Perrine, Eugene**
---
[**Register Guard**](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/mps2/c/EgE/ni0YAA/t.316/yOAnnoOyQd2HT9tlvEUfEw/h8/9Keqjt2rNZ2OQD7Ygf3GCNJ17KhjkUCVUNxILqlweBVZbvESTIGj6keKAp8MVZpBoHw85d0LkCwBeoUw-2B-2BG6rR-2BgZNPGneTc5ZKlIt7DCDd7Vt87rFb6MH0QFL5XzG4Gp-2Bp-2B4aImFnbTXimHIfeJl-2BVCrzKghzCLjb34u8QJ033Alq7C-2BdTvuUPaSoRnO9Kl2e0GuMnpUWSYBcRrYExxqMZ3UNnsrO4bZL9YSqf47aqCMzUKKckoApyh91mo6iPH7VSQCHXqo3hQ8NSDYsNWT3I3aKg7MkJKZrvKrbo5mUuzd7fkvrP4MKPJwq-2B1Inw7Ua2lggbTHbVgYtfNrKjbdID8uwuFCs0vyO1j2GhXxPCDc2mLJYG0kJn8vfIadpF8/tQrh) _**Boomer Says OK**_ "As a voter who historically voted for Rep. Peter DeFazio, I envisioned a millennial or Gen-Z person's perception of your editorial (Our View, "Not the time for left to vote out DeFazio," April 15). These generations have grown up with an endless war, immigrant families being put in cages at the border, police killings of black Americans, astronomical student debt loan, their school campuses becoming killing fields, subsidization of fossil fuel industry while their lobbyists line the pockets of politicians and political leaders who have ignored science-based predictions of global warming and climate disruption for as long as DeFazio has been in office. Business-as-usual or status-quo politicians will not wash with the younger generation or with me, a Boomer. Vote Doyle Canning for 4th Congressional District. - **Jim Neu, Eugene**

clean_body: Welcome to the final four weeks of our campaign! Voter pamphlets have hit mailboxes. The deadline to register to vote is in FIVE DAYS. And we are doing everything we can to hit the phones harder than ever to win this race on May 19. If you were thinking.. | | | | LAWN SIGNS HAVE ARRIVED! | Dear supporters, Welcome to the final four weeks of our campaign! Voter pamphlets have hit mailboxes. The deadline to register to vote is in FIVE DAYS. And we are doing everything we can to hit the phones harder than ever to win this race on May 19. If you were thinking..."yeah I'll get out and knock doors when it's time to vote," NOW is that time. We need you to volunteer from home today, and every day you can until May 19. We have three shifts a day, at 12, 3, and 5. Many people getting involved for the first time, all are welcome. You can make calls from your couch, and you will really make the difference for this race. If you can't make calls, . We are spending money fast on yard signs, texting, power dialier software, digital ads and more. We need your support now or we won't hit our goals. The urgency of change in our country is at a fever pitch, with the COVID 19 crisis continuing to spiral, and Democratic leadership Congress continuing to hold back from fighting for the solutions we need right now: healthcare for all, rent and mortgage relief, and monthly emergency basic income to keep our families afloat. Incumbency in Congress only helps us if the incumbent is fighting for us. We need new leadership that is unbought and unafraid to take a stand, and that's who I am and why I'm running. Thank you for your support and being part of this movement. Onward, Doyle ?linkid=9&canid=12471c8e444f80358077c9724aea85a0&source=email-the-oregonizer-500-billion-dollar-trump-slush-fund-2&emailreferrer=email783084from1056260&emailsubject=the-oregonizer-yard-signs-have-arrived-get-yours | | - is up and created by the talented volunteer leaders at Students for Canning! It's a goofy acapella jingle. Eye-catching and ear-catching, with a great message: REGISTER TO VOTE BY APRIL 28! IN THE NEWS... Take a Stand for Canning "You write (Our View, "Not the time for left to vote out DeFazio," April 15) "(Rep. Peter) DeFazio isn't the sort of representative who will make seismic changes in Washington, and he won't take flashy stands on issues important to many Oregonians." Excuse me, what? There has never been a time in which seismic shifts were more important than the one that we are in right now. As the coronavirus puts tens of millions of Americans out of work and all that our establishment politicians can think to do is bail out their corporate donors (looking at you, Boeing), we need progressive leaders like Doyle Canning in office more than ever. The Register-Guard 's half-hearted endorsement of DeFazio as a defender of the status quo reads to my generation as a full-throated endorsement of his opponent. It is time to take a stand against corporate corruption and insider politics. It is time to take a stand to fight for working people in our district and our nation. It is time to take a stand with Doyle Canning." - Madeline Cowen, Eugene The Planet will Vote Them Out "In response to the Register-Guard's "Our View" piece in faithful deference to Peter DeFazio, we say this: The exact time for a change in leadership is now! We have less than nine years to change the course we are on or we will live through a human-made crisis that makes the COVID-19 pandemic look like a rehearsal. Consider that it is the "seniority" and "institutional knowledge" of our elected Congress that has done nothing to stop the climate crisis we face. The minds that allowed the problem to accelerate are not the minds with the ability and courage to correct it. This responsibility falls on the younger generations that will live through the mid-21st century when the peak of collapse is due. It's time for the over-65 representatives to get out of the way so energetic youth, like Doyle Canning, can get on with a Green New Deal, clean energy, restore our farm and forest land and educate future generations how to create a balance between humans and planet. Either we choose new leadership in 2020, or the planet will choose our future leaders from the humble citizens who survive the collapse. - Deb McGee and Linda Perrine, Eugene Boomer Says OK "As a voter who historically voted for Rep. Peter DeFazio, I envisioned a millennial or Gen-Z person's perception of your editorial (Our View, "Not the time for left to vote out DeFazio," April 15). These generations have grown up with an endless war, immigrant families being put in cages at the border, police killings of black Americans, astronomical student debt loan, their school campuses becoming killing fields, subsidization of fossil fuel industry while their lobbyists line the pockets of politicians and political leaders who have ignored science-based predictions of global warming and climate disruption for as long as DeFazio has been in office. Business-as-usual or status-quo politicians will not wash with the younger generation or with me, a Boomer. Vote Doyle Canning for 4th Congressional District. - Jim Neu, Eugene | ANNOUNCEMENTS... | ATTENTION ALL CANNING FOR CONGRESS VOLUNTEERS!
